reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of Jiet Jodhpur JDAT.

review_content.Placements: About 30% of students got placed this year. They claim 100% placement, but very few companies are interested here, and there is a lack of awareness about the opportunities. The placement packages are also poor, and students who were previously placed have also been fired from their positions, with no job security.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is getting worse day by day, with broken walls and washrooms that lack sanitization. The hostels are very poor, and the food provided is often inedible. There are no sports events, and the college does not support students in that regard. If students engage in sports, they have to do it on their own; the administration only takes credit for any achievements.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Interior Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of JIET Institute of Design and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Around 99% of students got internships in Morphogenesis, GM Designer, and many more out of the city. Roles offered are supervisor, 3D designer, and plan maker. The lowest salary package offered is 13 LPA. The average salary package offered is 20 LPA, and the highest salary package offered is 50 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, library, and conference hall are available. The food served in the mess is good. Sports like cricket, volleyball, and football are provided.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. Semester exams are tough but they provide both practical and theory knowledge. The pass percentage is 90% and teachers are very helpful. BTU is delaying the date of our new batch so faculty members are late for our course.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: JIET is one of the best options for doing B.Tech.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placements in our college. The placements are good if the students are serious about their studies. The average salary package is 5 LPA for computer Science. They also provide internships to the students. Top companies like Infosys, Capgemini, Teion, etc. hire students from our college, and also students with reappears can get placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: One of the best places to stay is a hostel with facilities like free Wi-Fi, free gym, internet labs, hostel library, 24x7 electricity, etc. Sports facilities are really good but the equipments need application and for that, students have to roam from here to there for signatures.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good college to build upur career.

review_content.Placements: Mostly students are getting placements for web design and sales domain only. Drives containing companies of our core domain are rare to be seen. Although the faculty members are trying their best to get more companies. The college also provided in-house training for those students who did not got any external trainings or internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus does have Wi-Fi but in some departments the range is minimal. The canteen is good but the food taste can be improved a little. The prices are reasonable. Classrooms does have AC but most of the time they don't work. Since the campus is renovating i hope it will improve all the facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Data Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college needs to provide good teachers rather than irritating students to pay fees.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not that much in this college. Most students get placed in IT companies. The lowest salary package offered ranges from 2.5 LPA to 10 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 3.5 LPA to 4.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Infosys, and Byjus. Students can try off-campus placements if they want. One of the students gets the highest salary package of 52 LPA off-campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. It has 2 buildings one is south campus i.e old building, and other is north campus i.e new building both has good laboratories, classroom, and libraries as well as Wi-Fi facility is also provided. The hostel is also good, but do not come here for games. The games facilities are not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: JIET provided 90% placements in my branch. The highest package depends on the student. The average package is 4.5 to 6 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3.5 to 2.5 LPA. The top companies are TCS, Infosys, and many more from all over India. The college always tries its best to provide internships, and all the students get internships according to their choice. The college asks students about the companies of their interest to do an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and most importantly, the maintenance of the garden and seating areas is good. Wi-Fi and internet connectivity are good. The library is the best to gain knowledge. Sports and medical facilities are satisfactory, but the canteen is not up to the mark.

college_info.college_name: DEI Technical College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding DEI Technical College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at DEI Technical College?
faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the DEI Technical College is approximately INR 8340 - INR 25200.

faqs.question: Can I get DEI Agra with 2 Lacs rank in AYUSH?
faqs.answer: Considering the DEI Agra cutoff 2024, the 2 lacs rank is much more than the cutoff released by the institute. So, it is quite clear that it is very difficult to get into the institute with this rank. Further, the cutoff rank for BHMS stood at 1321964 for the General AI category candidates.

faqs.question: What is the expected AYUSH cutoff 2025 for admission to DEI?
faqs.answer: DEI admission to the Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) course is also based on AYUSH scores. Candidates seeking admission must have a valid AYUSH score in order to be eligible for the admissions. During the DEI Agra AYUSH cutoff 2024, the last-round BHMS stood at 1321964 for admission to Shivaji University for the General category students in the All India quota. So, the assumed expected cutoff for the upcoming admission session 2025 can stood upto 1330000. Further, this expected percentile is subject to diversity of courses. It can vary different for different course and colleges.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at DEI Technical College?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, DEI Technical College has an impressive review rating of 3.75 by 57 students.

placements.overview: Students can work with faculty on research projects

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Many students started their own start-ups
Majority opted in India
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    DEI Technical College offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Stampit Business Solutions, Fuji Silvertech, Phoenix It Solutions, Avantha Holding Limited, Badri Rai & Construction Pvtltd, Chirag Dental Hospital, Creme Castle Restaurant, Hotel Moon, Pousse Management Services Pvtltd, Greenbills Technologies Pvt Ltd, In2It Tech Pty Ltd, Codemac, Majestic Developers, Excelling 3Dp Pvt Ltd, Yashshvi Rasayan Pvtltd Dahej, E
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at DEI Technical College during placements?

faqs.answer: A:    The median salary granted to students upon a successful placement from the DEI Technical College is INR 1.91 LPA, indicating the institution's commitment to fostering prosperous career beginnings, with graduates receiving a commendable financial remuneration.
faqs.question: What is the median placement salary offered to the students of DEI Technical College?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: DEI Technical College provides Full Time programs at the UG and After 10th levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Design, and have a fee structure of around INR 8,340 to 16,900. UG programs include UG Diploma. Further, the After 10th programs include After 10th Diploma.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Mechanical branch is very good. Dayalbagh provides 100 placements.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students were placed in mechanical engineering, automobile, electrical, electronics, and civil. The highest package offered was 6 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.50 LPA. Recruiting companies were Schlumberger, Maruti Suzuki, Honda, Eicher, and Volvo. 100% of students got internships in mechanical, automobile, civil, and electrical.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very good. Infrastructure was very good, and the maintenance was proper. The quality and facilities were very good. Hostel food was very good like home. Hostel fee was very cheap. Canteen food was also good. Medical facilities were available, and this was a very good college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Average college life of Diploma students

review_content.Placements: Animal thirty out of forty students got placed with an average of two lacs forty thousand rupees per annum. The biggest MNC company that came was SLB, which offers 4 LPA. No one got placed there. Internship is not given by the college; students would have to find internships themselves because it's mandatory for our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are fine, and benches are also even. DEI has a big computer lab, but only a few of them are working, and some of them do not have the required software to work, like Python, MATLAB, C, etc. I did not stay in the hostel, but my friend did for a few months; he shifted later near the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Become an Engineer with DEI Technical College.

review_content.Placements: In my course, about 90-95% of students get placed. The highest salary offered is around 6 LPA, and the lowest is about 2.5 LPA. On average, students get around 3.5 LPA, which is pretty good. Companies like TATA, Suzuki, Accenture, BATA, Liberty, and Honda visit for placements. Our college has a great placement record, with big companies like TATA Motors, Maruti Suzuki, and Mahindra coming for hiring. As an electrical engineering student, I’m really excited for placements because people say, and even the teachers mention, that students in electrical, automobile, and mechanical fields usually get the best job offers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely excellent faculty members, but not that good placements in civil branch.

review_content.Placements: In my batch of 55 students, only 4 were placed in an MNC. The other remains had the opportunity but they were giving a too low salary. If we want to be placed, I would say everyone has a placement. The top recruiting companies are TATA Project, Fenesta, and Ultratech. Basically, colleges do not provide any internships you have to find on your own.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure is pretty good as it has ancient-time buildings that stay cool during the summers because of their high ceilings. Labs are well maintained, done regularly and have all the necessary equipment. There is no Wi-Fi on campus; even phones are not allowed but everyone brings.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: D.E.I. Technical College is the best college.

review_content.Placements: D.E.I. Technical College is the best college for a diploma in Mechanical Engineering. Its high placement rate means every student will get a job. Every student must have a CGPA of at least 6 in order to be considered for a better job. Its average package is INR 3 Lacs per annum, and the highest package is INR 6 lacs per annum. Many companies visit the college for placements, like Tata Motors, Maruti Suzuki, and many manufacturing companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this course, students have access to a hostel for study. The hostel is very neat and clean. The hostel fees are very small: only INR 4000 per year and INR 2000 per month for food. Really, this is the best college for a diploma in engineering. A technical library is also available on this campus, where all books are available for study at a very low cost. All sports are available in this college, and sports are compulsory for every student because their marks are also included.

reviews_list.batch_info: Vocational Diploma in Information Technology + B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is really good and satisfying here.

review_content.Placements: 10 percent of students were placed. Packaged ranges between INR 2 lpa and 4 lpa. TCS, Cogniizant, and HCL are the top recruiting companies. Students got internships through their own efforts at corporate companies. Data analytics, web developer, programmer, Android developer—you can work as a trainee where companies will provide you training before hiring, Java developer, system administrator, etc. are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available; there is no Wi-Fi facility, and the use of mobile phones is not allowed on campus. I was not a hosteler, but I think it was affordable and survivable according to my friends; otherwise, you can live in PG too. Sports and games facilities were available, and you could participate in various games. NCC was not available for girls.

review_summary.college_name: DEI Technical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Mechanical branch is very good. Dayalbagh provides 100 placements.

content.Placements: 100% of students were placed in mechanical engineering, automobile, electrical, electronics, and civil. The highest package offered was 6 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.50 LPA. Recruiting companies were Schlumberger, Maruti Suzuki, Honda, Eicher, and Volvo. 100% of students got internships in mechanical, automobile, civil, and electrical.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were very good. Infrastructure was very good, and the maintenance was proper. The quality and facilities were very good. Hostel food was very good like home. Hostel fee was very cheap. Canteen food was also good. Medical facilities were available, and this was a very good college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Average college life of Diploma students

content.Placements: Animal thirty out of forty students got placed with an average of two lacs forty thousand rupees per annum. The biggest MNC company that came was SLB, which offers 4 LPA. No one got placed there. Internship is not given by the college; students would have to find internships themselves because it's mandatory for our course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are fine, and benches are also even. DEI has a big computer lab, but only a few of them are working, and some of them do not have the required software to work, like Python, MATLAB, C, etc. I did not stay in the hostel, but my friend did for a few months; he shifted later near the college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Become an Engineer with DEI Technical College.

content.Placements: In my course, about 90-95% of students get placed. The highest salary offered is around 6 LPA, and the lowest is about 2.5 LPA. On average, students get around 3.5 LPA, which is pretty good. Companies like TATA, Suzuki, Accenture, BATA, Liberty, and Honda visit for placements. Our college has a great placement record, with big companies like TATA Motors, Maruti Suzuki, and Mahindra coming for hiring. As an electrical engineering student, I’m really excited for placements because people say, and even the teachers mention, that students in electrical, automobile, and mechanical fields usually get the best job offers.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely excellent faculty members, but not that good placements in civil branch.

content.Placements: In my batch of 55 students, only 4 were placed in an MNC. The other remains had the opportunity but they were giving a too low salary. If we want to be placed, I would say everyone has a placement. The top recruiting companies are TATA Project, Fenesta, and Ultratech. Basically, colleges do not provide any internships you have to find on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure is pretty good as it has ancient-time buildings that stay cool during the summers because of their high ceilings. Labs are well maintained, done regularly and have all the necessary equipment. There is no Wi-Fi on campus; even phones are not allowed but everyone brings.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: D.E.I. Technical College is the best college.

content.Placements: D.E.I. Technical College is the best college for a diploma in Mechanical Engineering. Its high placement rate means every student will get a job. Every student must have a CGPA of at least 6 in order to be considered for a better job. Its average package is INR 3 Lacs per annum, and the highest package is INR 6 lacs per annum. Many companies visit the college for placements, like Tata Motors, Maruti Suzuki, and many manufacturing companies.
content.Infrastructure: In this course, students have access to a hostel for study. The hostel is very neat and clean. The hostel fees are very small: only INR 4000 per year and INR 2000 per month for food. Really, this is the best college for a diploma in engineering. A technical library is also available on this campus, where all books are available for study at a very low cost. All sports are available in this college, and sports are compulsory for every student because their marks are also included.

reviews.review_heading: Mechanical branch is very good. Dayalbagh provides 100 placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were very good. Infrastructure was very good, and the maintenance was proper. The quality and facilities were very good. Hostel food was very good like home. Hostel fee was very cheap. Canteen food was also good. Medical facilities were available, and this was a very good college.

reviews.review_heading: Average college life of Diploma students
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fine, and benches are also even. DEI has a big computer lab, but only a few of them are working, and some of them do not have the required software to work, like Python, MATLAB, C, etc. I did not stay in the hostel, but my friend did for a few months; he shifted later near the college.

reviews.review_heading: Become an Engineer with DEI Technical College.
reviews.review_text: My college has WiFi for students, but the speed is limited. The labs are always clean, with a strong focus on safety. Classrooms are big, clean, and equipped with projectors. Our library is excellent, with a wide range of great books, especially for learning concepts. The rooms are of very good quality, and we have proper medical facilities. The canteen offers good food in both quality and quantity. I also participate in different sports and games, and my experience has been really positive.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely excellent faculty members, but not that good placements in civil branch.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is pretty good as it has ancient-time buildings that stay cool during the summers because of their high ceilings. Labs are well maintained, done regularly and have all the necessary equipment. There is no Wi-Fi on campus; even phones are not allowed but everyone brings.

reviews.review_heading: D.E.I. Technical College is the best college.
reviews.review_text: In this course, students have access to a hostel for study. The hostel is very neat and clean. The hostel fees are very small: only INR 4000 per year and INR 2000 per month for food. Really, this is the best college for a diploma in engineering. A technical library is also available on this campus, where all books are available for study at a very low cost. All sports are available in this college, and sports are compulsory for every student because their marks are also included.

reviews.review_heading: It is really good and satisfying here.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available; there is no Wi-Fi facility, and the use of mobile phones is not allowed on campus. I was not a hosteler, but I think it was affordable and survivable according to my friends; otherwise, you can live in PG too. Sports and games facilities were available, and you could participate in various games. NCC was not available for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Best Deemed college in Agra with good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not that much 5 Star but good for hostel life it's pretty good with good mesh, cleaning and timely sports, games programs in the hostel washroom are clean with good warden all the students are good and follow the rules of the hostel and the management.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was very good. It was clean. It had an eco-friendly environment. The mess provided different types of food items daily. There were gaming sessions every week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dayalbagh Educational Institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, and the management of the university is very good. The university has 3 boys' hostels and 2 girls' hostels. The whole campus has got solar panels and a major part of the college's electricity is derived using solar panels.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college and the fee structure is also affordable.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are old but the education is good in our college. Laboratory is good, and instrument is also available for experiments. Hostel fee structure is reasonable. There are not sufficient water resources to drink water. In chemistry laboratory, all instruments are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college conducts exams very strictly.
reviews.review_text: The campus had all facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, CAD-CAM classes, and a library. The hostel was provided to students. The canteen, medical facilities, and many games were available.

reviews.review_heading: It has all facilities and a multiverse.
reviews.review_text: Department has good facilities of library, whole classrooms and electricity facilities, library facility. Eco-friendly environment and systematic discipline best faculty for management of college premises. All sports materials and departments are there to proceed with games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Dayalbagh educational institute The dream of middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: It has a technical building having personal GATE no. 6 for Diploma pursuing students. The Wi-Fi is only for the staff not for the students. The classroom is good. There is a library for Diploma students but the books are old, not such advanced and new editions. The hostel is okay but the room is small and there are 3 students in a room so there is not much enough space in the room. The food quality is good but I only observed the canteen food, not the mess food. Medical facilities are excellent ...

reviews.review_heading: The quality of teaching in our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our building is very old but strong. All types of facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and library are available in our college. The classes of all the subjects seem to be proper, along with all the practicals are also done. All types of facilities related to the course are available. The hostel is quite good compared to the fee. The food also tastes good, pure and fresh. Games are also conducted, both indoor and outdoor activities are organized. Cultural a...

reviews.review_heading: It provided good placements in 2018-19 and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is not available for us outside the computer lab. Classrooms are average, and the library is pretty good. The hostel is not up to the mark, and I have stayed in the college hostel for 1 year. The food served is average but not good. The canteen is average. The medical facilities are very good. Sports and games are easily available for everyone to play.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for BA Hons programme at SMVDU?

faqs.answer: A:    SMVDU admission process are both entrance and merit-based followed by counselling. SMVDU accepts the admission on the basis of CUET exam for most of the UG & PG courses.  For few courses such as BTech, MBA, M.Tech admission are based on JEE/CAT/MAT/GATE/CCMT.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in SMVDU without CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Merit-based admissions and entrance-based admissions are also done in Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University. To be considered on a merit basis, you must take the entrance exam listed in the university's rulebook earlier. You must take the entrance exam known as the Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University Entrance Exam if you haven't taken an entrance exam before. Let me offer you a brief explanation of the tests that are necessary for the relevant courses: B.Tech: CUET or JEE MAINM.Tech: GATE or SMVDUEEMBA: CAT, MAT, CMAT, SMVDUEE, and so forth.

reviews_list.review_title: SMVDU: Where learning meets nature.

review_content.Placements: Here at SMVDU, most students got placed. In the case branch, the average package is 5 to 6 LPA, and the highest this year is 32.5 LPA. Some of the top recruiters are Wipro Accenture, Zscaler Vi, L&T, TCS, etc. Students have to do internships in the 4th, 6th, and 8th semesters; it is compulsory.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good on the campus, which is 474 acres. The campus has Wi-Fi in all areas, classes, labs, and a central library. The food is also better in SMVDU. There are two girls' and five boys' hostels. It has its central gym for boys and girls. You are provided full medical assistance in the hospital. All the bills are paid by the university. It has all the sports facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: College surrounded by trikuta hills.

review_content.Placements: TCS, Wipro, L&T, and other companies visited my college every year. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 4 LPA. If someone wanted to do internships our college also provided internships to students. Students need to maintain CGPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good. College provided high-speed internet connectivity and smart classes. There was a big library. review_summary.college_name: SMVDU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. In Economics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: SMVDU has a scenic campus, supportive faculty, good academics, and improving placements.

content.Placements: Placements for our batch in the economics and related courses are satisfactory. 70 to 75 percent of students are successfully placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest package is around 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6 LPA to 7 LPA. Top recruiters included Deloitte, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, and ICICI Bank. 60 percent of students got internships in reputed organizations such as NITI Aayog, state government departments, and corporates. The most offered roles are business analyst, data analyst, financial consultant, research associate, and management trainee.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) In Economics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: A few of them were placed because there is a smaller mass of people in economics. That's one of the reasons. I am not sure about the package, but I can say a decent amount. In different courses, students got internships and even placements. Range and ICICI are the recruiting companies. HR and research analyst are the common roles.
content.Infrastructure: The library is the main facility, which is helpful for the students. Wi-Fi facility is available for both students and faculty members. There are several messes and canteens available for different houses. A gymnasium is available for hostel students. Ground available for all the students. University sports games are held among different houses.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SMVDU: Where learning meets nature.

content.Placements: Here at SMVDU, most students got placed. In the case branch, the average package is 5 to 6 LPA, and the highest this year is 32.5 LPA. Some of the top recruiters are Wipro Accenture, Zscaler Vi, L&T, TCS, etc. Students have to do internships in the 4th, 6th, and 8th semesters; it is compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good on the campus, which is 474 acres. The campus has Wi-Fi in all areas, classes, labs, and a central library. The food is also better in SMVDU. There are two girls' and five boys' hostels. It has its central gym for boys and girls. You are provided full medical assistance in the hospital. All the bills are paid by the university. It has all the sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: College surrounded by trikuta hills.

content.Placements: TCS, Wipro, L&T, and other companies visited my college every year. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 4 LPA. If someone wanted to do internships our college also provided internships to students. Students need to maintain CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good. College provided high-speed internet connectivity and smart classes. There was a big library. Classrooms were well organized and equipped with CCTV cameras. Hostel infrastructure was good. But hostel food was not that good. There was a huge sports ground also.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good campus life and excellent campus area.

content.Placements: 40% of students got placed in my course. 1 LPA is the lowest package, 3 LPA is the average package and 17 LPA is the highest package. L&T Construction, Ambuja Cement, and Pidilite are the top recruiters. Almost 30% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are high-tech labs and good Wi-Fi connectivity. Projectors are available in classrooms. Library has huge variety of books. Two sharing rooms are available in hostel. 4 badminton courts are available in my hostel. A large mess is available with good quality food. A medical dispensary is available on the campus with ambulance.

admission_overview.college_name: SMVDU Admissions 2025: CUET, Eligibility, Cutoff, Date & Fee

paragraphs: SMVDUadmission process 2025is bothentranceandmerit-basedfollowed by SMVDUCounselling. Candidates can apply online on the official website of the university while entrance examination applications are available on their respective websites.

Located in Katra, Jammu & Kashmir,SMVDUaccepts admission on the basis of theCUETexamination for the majority of the undergraduate & postgraduate programmes. Students willing to apply forBTechadmission must have passed Class 12 with PCM stream from a recognised board or equivalent. Also, students must qualify for theJEE MainsorCUET UGexam followed by University level Direct Counselling orJOSAAor AIR (CRL) at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University.

SMVDUis ranked among thetop 100engineering institutions & top 150 Universities in the Country by NIRF 2018, Ministry of HRD, Govt. of India. It offerssixundergraduates,14postgraduates and other PhD programs through four faculties that areEngineering,Science,Nursing,Management, Humanities & Social Science. SMVDU isopenfor admission to the 2025-26 to theBArchcourse. These courses are delivered by trained faculty in full-time mode. Check out theSMVDU admission 2025highlights below:

Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University offers various UG & PG level courses, such asBE/BTech,BSc, B.A.,MSc, M.A. and MBA etc. To apply for these courses, candidates need to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria of SMVDU. Students get selected on the basis ofCUETentrance scores for most of the courses. ForSMVDUBTechadmission, applicants need to qualify forJEE Main. Check out the table below forSMVDU course eligibilityalong with selection criteria details:

Know moreSMVDU courses

SMVDU fee includes tuition fee, annual fees, one-time charges, security deposit hostel fees etc. Candidates have to pay a one-time fee for all the courses which isINR 12,750. The tuition fee for all the courses mentioned here ranges betweenINR 50,000 and INR 5.8 lakh.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many students drop a degree or a college. While access to school has been made possible by the availability of education loans and scholarships but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University course admissionsare granted on the basis of various factors including valid scores in the qualifying examination, seat availability, andSMVDU CUET cutoff/ qualifying examination cutoff. The number of seats varies depending on the courses at the university. The MTech programme has limited seats, while the BTech course has a larger seat intake. Below are the seat intake details for some of the courses at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University:

Seats Intake

Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University provides the reservations as per the State government and Central government rules. The reservations are available to students belonging to areas, such as the Adjoining Line of Actual Control(ALC), InternationalBorders, or children ofDefencepersonnel etc. Find below the seat reservation details for different category students at SMVDU, Katra:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University conducts the admission process in two phases:Phase 1andPhase 2. Theapplicationwindow for both phases isclosedfor the 2025-25 academic session. Candidates applying for 2025 admission, need to follow different steps for admission to SMVDU courses. Below is the step-by-step process forSMVDU admission:
Step 1: Application:Apply online on the official website @smvdu.ac.in
Step 2: Selection:Merit shall be declared on the basis of score in the entrance exam, such as JEE main/CSAB/NATA/CUET/CAT/MAT/CMAT/GATE.
Step 3: Counselling:Counselling starts in the month ofMayfor most of the courses.
Step 4: Admission Confirmation:Admission confirmation letters will be sent to selected candidates. A Bank loan letter will also be provided if required.

Step 5: Fee Payment & Document Verification:Admission shall be provisional subject to verification of the original documents. The annual fee payable including the hostel charges shall have to be paid in one lump at the time of admission.

For BTech, after theJoSAAorCSABregistration, candidates must fill in their choice of courses and colleges from the available list. The courses and colleges matching the candidate’s eligibility will be listed out in online mode. Candidates can choose SMVDU from the given list and the BTech course they wish to opt for.

faqs.question: How are B.Tech placements at SMVDU?
faqs.answer: According to NIRF report 2023, 164 BTech, 11 MTech, 68 MBA, 4 Integrated MBA and 13 BArch students were placed during SMVDU placements 2022. The median package offered to BTech and M.Tech students stood at INR 4.6 LPA and INR 4.01 LPA.The placements at the college are overall good and the students have good reviews about the placements.

faqs.question: Can I get into Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University with 70%?
faqs.answer: Candidates must have taken their Class 12 Exam or any comparable qualifying examination in 2023 or have passed their Class 10+2 Exam or equivalent in 2020 or 2021 with at least 50% of their total marks from a recognised board to be eligible.Also, admission to MBA Course is done on the basis f CAT or MAT percentile. It should be between 80 to 90 percentile for admission in Shri Vaishno Devi University for MBA course.

faqs.question: What are my chances of getting into SMVDU, if my state rank is 30000 for the General quota?
faqs.answer: First of all, candidates don't have option to avail any course via there home state quota. TheSMVDU cutoff 2025has been released for the candidates belonging to All India quota. During theSMDVU JEE Main cutoff 2025, the required rank to get into the BTech courses at institute should range between64782and91814for the General AI quota, so, candidaes applying with General AI quota can surely get admission at 30000 rank.

Students can check their cutoff scores according to the courses they want to pursue. For insight let me give you cutoff of some courses in 2023:B.Arch- 1041 rankB.Tech - 55304 rank to 69379 rankM.T

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University?
faqs.answer: The Eligibility Criteria for MBA in this university  is :-candidate must have passed Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks or equivalent CGPA in any discipline from any recognised University/Institute.We can have a look at Admission Process too as :-Firstly Register and Apply: Interested candidates can apply online with the required information.Secondly Group Discussion & Personal Interview (GDPI) Shortlisted candidates will be called for group discussion and personal interview

faqs.question: Can I get admission in SMVDU without CUET?
faqs.answer: SMVDU admission processare both entrance and merit-based followed by counselling. SMVDU accepts the admission on the basis ofCUET examfor most of theUG & PGcourses.  For few courses such as BTech, MBA, M.Tech admission are based on JEE/CAT/MAT/GATE/CCMT.

faqs.question: What is the JEE Main cutoff for SMVDU?
faqs.answer: SMVDU admissions to BTech and BArch courses is based on JEE Main cutoff 2023 for several specialisations. Tabulated below are the last round closing ranks for SMVDU:Course2023B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering94017B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering227213B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering402493Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.)3869B.Tech.6 in Civil Engineering657668B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering505053

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University?
faqs.answer: Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University offers BE/BTech courses with a duration of 4 years. Admission to this course isbased on JEE Main scoresand it is not possible to get admission to SMVDU Katra without JEE Main or CUET UG.Along  with this a lot of courses are offered by this university and all have different eligiblity and criterias. All applicants have tofill the Common Application form through ONLINE Modefor admission in UG and PG programmes.The candidates will be submitting an appication fee of Rs. 1,500/- while filling the ONLINE Application Form.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for SMVDU 2024?
faqs.answer: SMVDU conducts application process in two-phases. ForPhase 1, the last date of closing of application forms for BTech / BArch / MSc/ MA courses is inMay.For BTech/BArch/BA/BSc/BBA, the opening date of application forms forPhase 2are available estimately after 15 days of the declaration of results.

placement_report.college_name: SMVDU Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SMVDU Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 5.5 LPA and INR 4.41 LPA , respectively. In addition, according to the Architecture NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during BArch placements 2023 stood at INR 2.5 LPA .

Earlier, the University concluded 2022 placements with 455 students placed in leading companies such as Tech Mahindra, Infosys, Accenture, and many others. Out of all, Cognizant emerged as the top recruiter with the highest number of students selected during SMVDU placements 2022.

According to NIRF report 2023, 164 BTech, 11 MTech, 68 MBA , 4 Integrated MBA and 13 BArch students were placed during SMVDU placements 2022. The median package offered to BTech and MTech students stood at INR 4.6 LPA and INR 4.01 LPA. For MBA and Integrated MBA students, the median package offered was INR 4.2 LPA and INR 4.02 LPA and for BArch courses, the median package stood at INR 2.5 LPA, respectively.
SMVDU Final Placements 2022:

The University has released the 2022 placement report that incorporates the number of students placed in respective companies. Alongside this, the NIRF Report 2023 is also linked below to get an estimate of the recruiters that visited the campus in 2022. Click on the below link to download the SMVDU placement report 2022 and NIRF Report 2023:

data: SMVDU Final Placements 2022: The number of students placed in 2022 was more than double the count that stood in 2021 A growth of almost 28% was recorded in the 2022 BTech median package when compared with 2022

faqs.question: How was placement at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University?
faqs.answer: The placements at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University (SMVDU) in 2023 were good, with an average package of INR 4.6 LPA for BTech students and INR 4.01 LPA for MTech students. The highest package offered was INR 12 LPA. The companies that visited the campus are: Tech Mahindra Infosys Accenture Cognizant Wipro TCS Capgemini HCL Technologies IBM Dell Deloitte EY and more. SMVDU has a dedicated Training and Placement Cell that assists students with summer training/internships and campus placements.

faqs.question: What is the best job to get after BSc from SMVDU?
faqs.answer: After pursuing BSc Hons from SMVDU, a number of career paths get open for such students. Students with a comprehension of the principles in the relevant areas of the BSc Hons programme have numerous job opportunities, including teaching, research analysis, data scientist, agriculture officer, forest officer, biochemist, among many others.

faqs.question: What was the median package offered to MBA students during Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University placements 2023?
faqs.answer: The median pay package handed to MBA scholars at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University( SMVDU) during placements in 2023 was INR4.2 LPA, according to the NIRF report for 2023. Consequently, the pay envelope packages for half of the MBA scholars that were placed were INR4.2 LPA or further and INR4.2 LPA or lower. During SMVDU placements in 2023, the maximum remuneration package handed to MBA campaigners was INR 12 LPA. Please be apprehensive that these aren't the average pay envelope packages, but rather the standard and the loftiest bones available. By multiplying the total number of scholars placed by the average compensation package, one may gain the average payment package.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for BA Hons programme at SMVDU?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to BA Hons at SMVDU must pay SMVDU BA Hons application fee 2024 of INR 1,500. The application fee so submitted can only be paid using online method of payment.

faqs.question: How costly is Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University?
faqs.answer: This Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University college can said to be costly or have a high fee as it provides high standards or students to get a quality education here. It has all Phd faculties and now if we look at the fee structure below :- MA - Rs. 81,000 ( 1st year fees ) M.Tech - Rs. 1.03 Lacs ( 1st year fees ) P.hd - Rs. 92,750 ( 1st year fees )

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for a B.Tech. In Civil Engineering at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University?
faqs.answer: The fee structure is the same for all the B.Tech. Programs at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University. The fee structure for a B.Tech. In Civil Engineering at Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University is as follow:- Semester tuition fee: Rs 66,000 Annual Hostel Fee: Rs 20,000 Annual Mess Fee: Rs 30,000 There may be some additional charges (approximately. Rs 10,000).. .

description: SMVDU cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the SMVDU JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

SMVDU JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the SMVDU CSE cutoff 2025 was 135569 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 270122 and 315040, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for

For the General AI category students, the SMVDU B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 135569 and 446423 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 135569 and 179732, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Robotics and AI were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at SMVDU. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at SMVDU to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of SMVDU. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

nirf.description:
SMVDU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SMVDU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, SMVDU's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Architecture and Planning', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SMVDU climbed 8 ranks to #23 rank in the 'Architecture and Planning' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: SMVDU has a scenic campus, supportive faculty, good academics, and improving placements.
reviews.review_text: SMVDU has modern facilities, with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, a central library, and digital resources. Hostels are clean with basic amenities, 24X7 internet, and study areas. Mess and canteen serve hygienic food. Medical center, sports complex, gym, and grounds support student health, and recreation is available for development.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The library is the main facility, which is helpful for the students. Wi-Fi facility is available for both students and faculty members. There are several messes and canteens available for different houses. A gymnasium is available for hostel students. Ground available for all the students. University sports games are held among different houses.

reviews.review_heading: SMVDU: Where learning meets nature.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good on the campus, which is 474 acres. The campus has Wi-Fi in all areas, classes, labs, and a central library. The food is also better in SMVDU. There are two girls' and five boys' hostels. It has its central gym for boys and girls. You are provided full medical assistance in the hospital. All the bills are paid by the university. It has all the sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College surrounded by trikuta hills.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. College provided high-speed internet connectivity and smart classes. There was a big library. Classrooms were well organized and equipped with CCTV cameras. Hostel infrastructure was good. But hostel food was not that good. There was a huge sports ground also.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life and excellent campus area.
reviews.review_text: There are high-tech labs and good Wi-Fi connectivity. Projectors are available in classrooms. Library has huge variety of books. Two sharing rooms are available in hostel. 4 badminton courts are available in my hostel. A large mess is available with good quality food. A medical dispensary is available on the campus with ambulance.

reviews.review_heading: In summary, I can say that our college is not as good as IITs but still a good choice for students.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities and infrastructure in our labs and classrooms, all the appliances are as good as new. Books availability is also good enough in library. Hostel is good but bathroom conditions are so bad. Rooms are clean and we get one single bed with one table and chair along with an almirah.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable college for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. College provides high-speed internet connectivity and smart classes. There is a big library and classrooms are well-organized and equipped with CCTV cameras. Hostel food is not that good but provides variety in food. There is a huge sports ground also.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review of SMVDU.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our department is not so good. We don't have our department we have to study in the architecture department. In our hostel, rooms are very big and clean but hostels washrooms are so bad even animals can't go there. Mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all facilities, but the hostel infrastructure is not good. Overall, good.
reviews.review_text: In the university, the civil branch has a combined department with architecture, where they provide three classrooms for civil students and some labs. The university also has a one central library and a gym. In the hostel, the university provides all basic necessities, but the only reason they lack is cleanliness, as hostels are not up to that level. The food provided is not good. But the overall experience is good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure but please don't go here if you have no other option.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is very beautiful and peaceful. Lush greenery everywhere but there are a ton of monkeys who attack you if they see bags in your hand so it's risky. Hostels are not that good as well. At least in girls hostel, there are always a ton of monkeys that make our lives difficult.

reviews.review_heading: An honest and unbiased review of Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is quite good. The hostel is also very nice. Rooms are very neat and look more like hotel rooms. The infrastructure of our washrooms is even worse than railway toilets. There is Wi-Fi everywhere. There is a library inside the hostel. You can play badminton. We have a very large ground on our campus where you can play any sport.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are bad, rare fests, great restrictions on girls, not worth it.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are just fine like the hostels are supposed to be. There's Wi-Fi available here but you cannot rely on it, there are frequent shutdowns, apart from that websites like Quora are banned on the university Wi-Fi. Classrooms are fine but you can expect the projectors to not work. Initially, the classes for CSE were held in a lecture theatre which has the facility AC and projectors working there but later on, they were shifted to classrooms. Library is fine, equipped with AC and you can find b...

reviews.review_heading: College and Clubs are inactive with no fest.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are not well-maintained, but the campus looks beautiful, especially at night. The hostel is different for students of different years. The 1st-year hostel is good. All other hostels have a badminton court and a basketball court, which is good and makes our hostel life beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Air quality is also good, and the morning view of Vaishno Devi is completely divine and mesmerizing. Hostels are also good. Each floor has Wi-Fi connections and LAN. Every student has their own keys, one table, one chair, and B.Ed. The canteen prices are also reasonable. During exams, it's open till 3-4 am to provide students with what they need.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good as compared to other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are well maintained, well equipped with internet and lifts and they have attached common washrooms for each floor and are well cleaned and hygienic. And hostel accommodation is like home and the mess food is also good. They have a variety of menu items, so you will never get bored of the menu.

college_info.intro:
CGC University offers courses at UG and PG levels. BTech, BSc and MBA are among the most popular programmes offered at the university. The university offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The university cover core courses in the areas of HR, Marketing, Finance, Operation Management, Business Analytics and Digital Marketing.
CGC University offers a four-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including CSE, Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Block Chain Technology, Cloud Computing, Robotics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, etc. CGC University courses enhances learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check below the popular courses offered at CGC University:

review_summary.college_name: CGC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Cyber Security - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Admission to the university is highly recommended.

content.Placements: The placement drive CGC University offers a high rate of recruitment (86 percent). Big industries like Amazon, IBM, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Adobe visit the campus and hire the best talent of the university. The average package offered to students is 12 LPA, and the highest package offered is 50 LPA. The average internship rate is 84 percent in various tech companies like Adobe, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. The canteen serves hygienic and nutritious food. It offers 24x7 medical help.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placement, AI-driven.

content.Placements: We have a very high placement rate in our college. Our seniors have got jobs within and even out of the campus with more than 30 LPA. Even more than 50 companies visit the campus with the best offers to the students. The future is in safe hands.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.

content.Placements: About 80-90% of students get placed, and the highest package of 2026 is 87 LPA, while the lowest is 4 LPA. All the big companies come to our college. On December 23rd, there was a placement day where all 4th-year students celebrated their placements. All facilities were also enjoyed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.

content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.
content.Faculty: My course has more practical work, and it is the exposure given to me for getting a job in the private sector. The college is also providing the dcpd department, which helps us to crack the job. Apart from that, we attend workshops and industries, which help us to see the practical work.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.

content.Placements: Excellent and good packages offered by the college, including placements with top recruiting companies for every particular courses and along with this, they offer good roles. Approximately 80% of students succeed in taking internship from the companies.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

admission_overview.description: CGC University admission 2026 is both merit and entrance-based depending on the programme. The applications at the university are conducted in both online and offline modes.. CGC University offers over 100+ courses at UG and PG levels in streams, such as Animation, Law, Design etc. through its various institutes. CGC University offers full-time courses across various specialisations, such as Biotechnology and HR among others.

For Engineering courses, the exam is mandatory. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The basic eligibility is as below: The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popular CGC University courses:

paragraphs: CGC University has a dedicated admission cell to assist the admission process. The objective of this cell is to guide potential students in making the selection from the different courses available at the university. Follow the steps forCGC University admission processgiven below:
Application Process
Interested students can register themselves at the CGC University website by submitting an application form. The form has to be submitted with required documents and an application fees.

The selection of a student for a particular course depends on the profile. Aspirants need to have a qualifying score in the minimum qualification required to be admitted to a course. Several aspects are taken into account to selecting a student, including:

Students are advised to check the information related to the respective to take admission. This can be done by purchasing the prospectus either online or offline. After initial registration, a student is required to pay the complete fee within one week of registration or one week after the announcement of final results. The seat of the student will be confirmed only after the complete fee has been deposited and the qualifying exam is cleared by the student. Information related to the commencement of classes and other details can be had from the admission cell or will be mailed individually.

faqs.question: Can I apply now for BA LLB Integrated at CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who are looking for BA LLB Integrated admission at CGC University can apply now at the official website. The student have to pass class 12 in any stream . The selection criteria for the course is merit-based.

faqs.question: How many BA LLB Integrated Seats are available CGC University?
faqs.answer: A total of 120 seats are available for BA LLB Integrated students at CGC University. For clarity, students can check the table presented below:CoursesSeatsB.A. LL.B. Integrated120

faqs.question: What is the BCA course fee at CGC University?
faqs.answer: As per the official stats, the BCA course fee at CGC University ranges between INR 2 lakh and INR 3 lakh. To apply for the course, the candidate have to meet the last educational qualification that is Class 12 in any stream.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for admission to CGC University BSc?
faqs.answer: CGC University admission portal is open for several courses including BSc. Students should register on-time to avoid missing out on the application process.

courses_data.name: CGC University BCA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: CGC University offers a three-year BCA course divided into six semesters. This UG programme focuses on computer application concepts and theory. Candidates must pass Class 12 to apply for the BCA course.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BCA at CGC University?
faqs.answer: The candidate need to pass Class 12 in any stream to get admission for BCA at CGC University. The BCA course (Bachelor of Computer Application) is a three-year (six semesters) full-time programme introduced by CGC University. This undergraduate programme focuses on computer application concepts and theory.

faqs.question: Can I take admission in CGC University MBA without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can take admission in CGC University MBA programme through several modes. They must also appear for national-level entrance exams like CAT, XAT, CMAT, GMAT, etc. Students can also be considered through the university's own entrance test (CGCUET), followed by GD and PI round.Final selection depends on academic performance, entrance score, and GD–PI performance.

faqs.question: How to apply for DPharma admissions at CGC University?
faqs.answer: The first stage of CGC University DPharma admissions is application submission. In this stage, candidates who aspire to take admission must apply for the course by visiting the official website of the institute. Following are the steps to apply:1. Go to the official website of the institute.2. Scroll down and click on the 'Apply Now' banner.3. Register with basic details to make a new candidature account.4. Login and fill out the application form.5. Pay the application fee and click on the submi

courses_data.name: CGC University BJMC Admission 2026
courses_data.description: The BJMC is a full-time three-year course at CGC University. To get admission to the course, the candidate needs to pass Class 12 in any stream. Candidates who have passed both their high school diploma and a three-year trade diploma from the Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training in Chandigarh, another state board of technical education that has been approved, or theSant Longowal Institute of Engineering & Technologyin Longowal, are also eligible for the course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BJMC at CGC University?
faqs.answer: For admission to BJMC at CGC University, there is a minimum eligibility criteria that needs to be fulfilled before applying for this course. Interested students must pass Class 12 or High School Diploma to become eligible for this course. The admission to BJMC is merit-based. Candidates are selected based on their performance in the previous qualifying exam. Once, students qualify the selection process they are allocated seats for this course. Get the full details about the CGC University BJMC c

faqs.question: Who are eligible for BJMC course at CGC University?
faqs.answer: In order to get admission to BJMC course at CGC University, students need to pass Class 12 in any stream by an accredited board/ university/ council. Else, they can also pass High School Diploma and a three-year trade Diploma from the Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training in Chandigarh/ any State board of technical education/ Sant Longowal Institute of Engineering & Technology in Longowal.

faqs.question: Can I do BPharma from CGC University without Class 12?
faqs.answer: No, students who have not completed Cass 12 cannot pursue the CGC University DPharma course. The admission committee has set the criteria that only those candidates who have successfully passed Class 12 examinations with Science as the stream are eligible to apply. Other than this, students with any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India are also considered for admissions.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for BSc programme at CGC University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BSc ranges fromINR 60,000 to INR 1.24 lakh.This happens because the fee varies as per the specialisation. Those who wish to know the exact fee for each specialisations can visit the official website of the institute.Note:The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidate who are looking for admission at CGC University can directly enrol for the respective course. The admissions is merit-based but for BTech and MBA programme, the university accept entrance exam such as JEE Main, CGCUET, etc. The students need to meet the last educational qualifications as per course requirement.

faqs.question: How can students join CGC University?
faqs.answer: CGC University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their past academic merit of Class 12 and graduation for UG and PG courses, respectively. Check below the step-wise CGC University admission process:Application Process:Apply for CGC University admissions in either offline or online mode.Selection Round:Admission to CGC University courses is both merit and entrance-based.Final Admission:After the completion of all the selection rounds, the selection candidates must pay a certain course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Are there any courses for which CGCUET is compulsory for scholarship and admission at CGC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, CGC University accepts CGCUET exam to offer admission and scholarship. Given below arecourses for which CGCUET is compulsory for scholarship and admission:BTech CSE (Computer Science & Engineering)BTech CSE (Cyber Security)BTech CSE (Data Science)BTech CSE (Internet of Things & Cyber Security Including Blockchain Technology)BTech AI & ML (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning)BTech AI & DS (Artificial intelligence & Data Science)BTech Robotics & AI (Artificial Intelligence)BTech Blockchain

faqs.question: What is CGC University cutoff for BTech for All India?
faqs.answer: Apart from JEE Main CGC University cutoff for BTech is based on PTU BTech as well. The institute offers two BTech specialisations based on PTU BTech scores followed by counselling. For cutpff 2022, the closing rank forB.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineeringstood at 1001 and forB.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Scienceit stood at1263for the General category All India candidates. The counselling ranks are released category-wise and round-wise. In 2023, the counselling was ended after Round 1 Seat Allotment. placement_report.college_name: CGC University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: CGC University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: CGC University Mohali has introduced Capgemini CodeXperience Centre for all BTech CSE and ECE students . It is a Global Capability Centre established exclusively for Capgemini placements . Through this Centre, structured and industry-integrated learning facility is provided to students on campus.

It is Capgemini’s one and only lab in North India. It will provide training to students for placements and hire more than 500 students every year. The training is based on Capgemini’s own syllabus that is designed as per global-skill requirements. There is an opportunity for students to get hired by Capgemini and more than 10 other partner companies through this training program.

CGC University has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The highest package offered stood at INR 1 Cr per annum . The student of the BTech CSE batch secured this package. 9 companies offered the package of INR 50 LPA to the batch 2025. More than 1005 recruiters visited the campus and placed 1361 students with good packages. The overall average salary secured by the batch 2025 was INR 6.34 LPA . The highest and average salaries offered to the MBA batch was INR 27 LPA and INR 9.5 LPA . The students of the BCA batch secured the highest salary of INR 33 LPA and the average salary of INR 9 LPA . The MCA batch secured the average salary of INR 10 LPA and the highest salary of INR 25 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of CG University in 2025 include Deloitte, Amazon, Infosys, IBM, Cognizant, Microsoft, Wipro, TCS, Accenture, etc.

As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #201-300 in the Engineering category. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in CGC University rankings.

nirf.description:
Over the years, CGC University has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2025. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. CGC University's rankings in 'Engineering' category have exhibited stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, CGC University's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.

outlook.description:
CGC University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook-ICARE 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Engineering (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have improved in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, CGC University climbed 7 ranks to #112 rank in the 'Engineering (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'BBA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, CGC University climbed 2 ranks to #52 rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel.description: Hostels are provided with the facilities such as air cooler in each room, arrangement for 24 hours uninterrupted power supply through govt, power supply, and college generators, internet connectivity through wi-fi system, hot water in winters and RO purified drinking water, facilities for indoor and outdoor games, 24 x 7 medical dispensary with ambulance etc, 24 hours security,laundry facility (optional on payment basis),tuck shops to cater to daily needs of the students,newspapers and magazines and a well-equipped gym in each hostel.

library.description: The institute has a computerized library with well-set equipment and modern day technology to encourage research activities and advanced reading. The library is stocked with numerous books authored by experts on the subject and subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional.The library subscribes to national and international journals, magazines and national and regional dailies to keep the students in touch with their fields of interest. The library is well furnished and can seat more than 100 students at a time in the spacious reading hall. The peaceful atmosphere in the library plays a major role in helping students concentrate and study better.  Apart from books, the library has a good collection of Audio video material, NPTEL, CDs & DVDs. The library has a separate “Book Bank” exclusively for the high flyers. Institute has E-Library and Journals.
