reviews.review_heading: Admission to the university is highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University is excellent, which builds an effective learning environment. The entire campus is pollution-free and Wi-Fi-enabled. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has fully air-conditioned libraries with efficient study materials. Laboratories are provided under the guidance of well-behaved staff and experienced faculty members. The hostel is well-equipped with spacious and clean rooms with all modern facilities. T...

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, AI-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is AI-driven with 24/7 Wi-Fi capabilities. The infrastructure of the blocks, classrooms, and labs is well-constructed and maintained by the holders. The food is too good. We always enjoy having it with our friends. Even this campus includes a dispensary for medical issues, and a lot of sports activities are organised by the clubs.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities. Only issue is that they ask for fee time to time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, and the hostel is also good. The mess is not as good as expected. The facilities are modern, and the campus is also nice. The greenery is the best part of the college. There is a big sports arena where you can play whatever you want. You can also join any club and enjoy college life.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good because it provides very good and knowledgeable skills.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, which includes a lush green garden, cafeteria, Wi-Fi facility for day and night use by students and teachers. Moreover, there is also a bank facility apart from the post office, and it also provides a transport facility.

reviews.review_heading: Positive environment with hygienic surroundings.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well maintained, though, and there is proper hygiene around blocks, and food quality for hostelers is full of hygiene. Mess and canteen are properly cleaned, and the university offers various sports opportunities. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is very good and supportive. Placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best in the surrounding area. The college has separate buildings for separate departments, and each building has more than 10 blocks. Apart from that, classrooms are ventilated and spacious. However, we are facing some problems.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good and still improving.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It has Wi-Fi facilities, and it is one of the best facilities for students. It helps us in our studies. There are games and entertainment. There is a digital app that gives us practical knowledge. Classrooms are ventilated, big, and spacious. Seats are comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience is good teachers and understanding and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available and infrastructure is good, lab contains perfectly functioning computer systems. I live nearby, so I do not know about the hostel facilities.  It is decent. Despensory is present in the college for any medical issue.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good teaching staff members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and well-maintained. It is usually clean. Hostels are clean and very accommodating. Plenty of food places are available. There are sports grounds for games like football, basketball, etc. Sports that take place are always refreshing and amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Students get a balanced college experience at CGC University, Mohali.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of CGC University, Mohali is great and well maintained. Classrooms and labs are well equipped. Washrooms are properly cleaned, which makes the daily college life comfortable. Most of the facilities needed by the students are easily available. Hostel facilities are decent and safe. Basic amenities like water coolers, electricity, 24x7 Wi-Fi and security are available. The mess food is average but manageable. Overall, the hostel environment is good for studying and living. It fe...

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good, and I recommend it to my friends and juniors for enrollment.
reviews.review_text: Everything is very good. Food is tasty. Safety and security are provided. Four meals are provided daily. Food is on time without delay. Rooms are clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Decent private university.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with a clean, modern campus. Classrooms, labs, library, hostels, Wi-Fi, and sports facilities are well maintained. The campus environment is lively and supports both academics and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is very good, safe, secure, and educational institution.
reviews.review_text: The library in our college is very big and spacious and it is well-ventilated. There are more than 5000 physical books available, and digital libraries also level a part from that. There is a day and night facility for Wi-Fi but sometimes it goes very slow due to the use of students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placement, and enjoyable campus life.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure for our course. Classrooms are spacious. They are equipped with projectors. Labs are well maintained with updated systems and required software. Campus Wi-Fi is available, but the speed is average at times. Library is large, well organized, and has sufficient books and digital resources for students.

reviews.review_heading: It provides better career opportunities with overall development from sports to practical skills.
reviews.review_text: We have a smart classroom with Wi-Fi available to us by the university, and our department provides us with labs that have proper software to work with. We also have a library where we can get every type of book, as well as an online facility.

faqs.question: Which one is better for B.Des, NID Assam or NID Vijaywada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh?
What is NID Andhra Pradesh cutoff with respective to other NIDs?
Can I get direct admission to B.Des at NID Vijayawada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh?
Will my application fee be refunded if I do not appear in NID 2025 exam but submit the application form?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh currently offering offers three four-year BDes courses to the students. It has three specialisations. Successful candidates accepted into the BDes programme at NID AP will be required to participate in a one-year foundation programme followed by six semester. The selection of a preferred discipline is dependent on a candidate's performance in the foundation programme. Other important information about the BDes course like specialisations and the total fee is added below:

faqs.answer: A:    National Institute of Design (NID) Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh offers 1 Course in 3 streams. The courses are, B.Des. in Communication Design, B.Des. in Industrial Design, and B.Des. in Textile and Apparel Design. Admission is given to 75 students only.Admission is based on the design aptitude test, a national entrance test for admissions, conducted by the institute. The eligibility is that a candidate must have cleared class 12th in any discipline from a recognized board.
faqs.question: Are admissions at NID Vijaywada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot enrol directly in NID Vijayawada or the National Institute of Design in Andhra Pradesh. NID Vijayawada admits students through a two-stage admission test procedure. The first step is the national exam administered by NID, called the Design Aptitude Test (DAT). The interview and design portfolio constitute the second phase.You must have received at least a 50% grade in your class 12 Diploma from an accredited board in order to be eligible for the DAT. Any of the three NID Vijaywada-offered disciplines—industrial design, textile and apparel design, and communication design—may be applied for the DAT.You will be placed for the design portfolio and interview if you pass the DAT. Your design expertise and skills should be on display in your portfolio. You might talk about your reason for pursuing a career in design as well as your design portfolio during the interview.Admittance is extremely competitive; only a small portion of candidates are chosen. On the other hand, your chances of success are higher if you have a strong portfolio and are passionate about design.
faqs.question: Can I join NID Vijayawada/ National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh, directly?

faqs.answer: A:     National Institute of Design, Andhra Pradesh or NID Vijayawada (NID Andhra Pradesh or NID Andhra Pradesh) admission is closed for admission session 2022. The NID DAT result for BDes was announced on July 27. Candidates who have been shortlisted as NID DAT 2022 scores are invited to attend counselling.
faqs.question: Can I apply for BDes at NID Andhra Pradesh now?

faqs.answer: A:    The NID Vijayawada offers undergraduate programmes at the Rs. 7.51 Lacs fee. Communication Design, Industrial Design and Textile & Apparel Design courses are offered in NID Vijayawada. The National Institute of Design Andhra Pradesh Vijayawada provides 75 seats every year for all undergraduate courses.The competent authority has approved the below fees for the academic year 2022-23 forB.Des Programme is 1,97,700

It will have all the requirements you want. The construction was a little slow because of some government issues. but hopes we will be there soon.

paragraphs: NID Vijayawada admission 2025isentrance-based. NID Vijaywada offers a full-time, four-yearBachelor of Design (BDes)with specialisation inIndustrial Design,Communication Design, andTextile & Apparel Design. Admission to the BDes programme is granted on the basis of the Design and Aptitude Test(DAT)administered to all NIDs in major cities across the country.

The National Institute of Design (NID) isinternationally knownas one of the finest educational and research institutions for Industrial, Communication, and Textile Design. NID Vijayawada, AP is among thesevenNIDs of India. Students admitted to the BDes programme atNID Vijayawadaare required to attend amandatoryFoundation Programmeforoneyear.
Check out the following video for complete details aboutNID admission process:

The National Institute of Design, Vijayawada isopenfor admission2025-26to theBDesprogramme. Interested candidates seeking admission to NID, need to fulfill bothage criteriaandacademicqualifications. For theGeneralandEWScategories, only eligible candidatesbornon or afterJuly 1, 2004,can apply for admission. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forNID Vijayawada courses:
To learn more about NID BDes admission requirements,Download:NID BDes Eligibility 2025 Info
Download:NID Vijayawada Handbook 2025-26

NID Vijayawada fee includes multiple components such as tuition fee, hostel fee, caution fee, etc. The caution fee is refundable. Students may have to pay the course fee semester-wise. For the academic session2025-26, the NID Vijayawada feewill be announced soonon the official website of NID.

Coming to the seat intake, In the BDes programme,each specialisationscan be filled up by amaximum of 25students at NID AP.Seat allotmentin the desired specialisation, is based on theperformance in theNID Foundation Programme. Tabulated below is theNID feefor Vijayawada campus courses:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The total number of seats for the BDes programme is divided into various categories including General Economically Weaker Section (EWS), OBC-Non Creamy Layer, SC, Person with Disability (PWD) etc. Students belonging to the *General categorycan avail of the seat reservations(10%)only if they belongEWS sectionand satisfy theconditionsas MHRD, India. The NID admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of the entrance exam as per respective courses. The entrance exam is conducted in two stages,PrelimsandMains. The exam dates are announced for 2025 admission. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at National Institute of Design, Vijayawada:
Step 1: NID Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of NID. The application fee is INR 3,000. Find below the key dates of application at NID:
Step 2: Selection Round

The selection criteria at NID are based onentrance examscores. However, candidates have to complete the last educational qualification per the college's respective courses. Students are selected based on the entrance exam ofDAT.
Step 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To confirm the seat, candidates must pay the required fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.answer: Some of the top recruiters of the National Institute of Design (NID) in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh include: Adobe Amazon Google Infosys Mahindra & Mahindra Maruti Suzuki Oracle Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) According to students' reviews placements are good at this institute. 98% of the students get placed almost every year, and 100% students get interships. The highest salary package provided was INR 30 LPA and the average salary package was INR 9 LPA.

Meanwhile, aspirants seeking admission can refer to the various exam-wise sections given below across multiple courses, categories, and quotas to understand the previous year's cutoff trends. More updates are given below:

NID Vijayawada cutoff 2026 will be released soon for admission to the B.Des and other courses. In the meantime, students can refer to the table below to view the NID Vijayawada past few years cutoff trends for admission across different courses and specialisations. In 2025, the last round cutoff rank for B.Des admission stood at 225. In 2024, the NID DAT last round cutoff rank for the same course was 185, while in 2023, it was 154 in the General AI category.

Candidates interested in taking admission to can refer to the table below to view some of the important NID DAT 2026 dates. National Institute of Design Entrance Exam is conducted for admission to B.Des and M.Des programmes at NID institutes in India.

NID DAT admission cutoff is the minimum final marks a candidate needs to secure in NID DAT entrance exam for admission to a B.Des or M.Des course in participating institutes. NID DAT cutoff are released for different courses and categories. Students can check out the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NID DAT cutoff PDFs.

hostel.description: The institute operates from a transit campus and it does not have its own hostels. However, the Institute facilitates secure hostel accommodation (housing estate) 1 km away from the campus. Apart from the living quarters, there are facilities such as a night guard, doctor on call, vehicle 24/7 for any medical emergencies, a mess facility which caters to the cultural diversity of India, and a common room with necessary appliances. The housing estate also provides amenities such as ATMs, Pharmacy, Post Office, Department stores, and both Indoor and Outdoor recreational areas. Amalgamation of cultures throughout India and celebration of pan Indian festivals.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, 3D Printing Lab

reviews.review_heading: Our college is recommended with high level of exposure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is not there. Colleges don't have a campus of their own. New college campus is almost ready. Resource centers are excellent and also have a subscription for e-libraries. Studios have high technology equipment. Campus has a Wi-Fi facility. It also provides transportation facilities. Canteen provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: Good. Waiting for offline classes.
reviews.review_text: As of now, we don't have any hostel or mess service. But our new NID campus is being constructed in Amravati. It's almost done. We will be shifting there soon. It will have all the requirements you want. The construction was a little slow because of some government issues. but hopes we will be there soon.

college_info.college_name: NID Vijayawada

data.description: Within the GATE complex, there is a Boy's Hostel, a Girl's Hostel, and an adjacent Mess facility. There are 208 rooms available in the hostel, which can house up to 292 students.  There are amenities like a doctor on call, a car for any medical emergency, a dining facility that accommodates the cultural variety of India, and a common area with utilitarian and recreational equipment in addition to the residential quarters and GATE site. Wide, lush grounds surrounded the school to provide a better setting for students' personal growth.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of college and faculty members .

review_content.Placements: Only 10-15 % students were offered placement. Faculty members make zero efforts in helping students for the same. And students find their own internship. Since college force students to come college and maintain 75% attendance students don't really get enough time to work on their skills and find internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: UPID don't have their own hostel students have to manage on their own. Locality is the worst. The faculty members don't really teach anything they just give the assignments. And for theories they ask students to make PPT on those topics and explain them. Bad food quality limited menu. No canteen, no sports and no games. It's like this college don't want students to be physically fit and active they just want students to complete the assignments and maintain 75% attendance.

overview_faqs.question: Is U.P. Institute of Design, Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: U.P. Institute of Design, Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University is a well-known institution for MBA/PGDM, B.Des, M.Des courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, U.P. Institute of Design, Dr. A.P.J. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.5 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3 on faculty and 3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: U.P. Institute of Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average infrastructure but great hands-on experience.

content.Placements: The placement cell is weak people don't get placed by the college itself 10 percent of the students get recruited from the university, and 13 LPA is the highest package offered by the company but it was outside the college. There are not as many companies only companies like Drute, and TVS come for the MBA recruitment B.Des recruitment cell is not great. The top roles are ui ux designer, and assistant designer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi only comes in a very small range and the labs, classrooms, and library are okay the classrooms have AC which is fully in working condition, the class also has lockers, and the classrooms get locked after 5 pm which is great too, the library has all the necessary books and its easy to get them issue. There is no hostel, the canteen has home-cooked food, there's a first aid kit, as for sports and games there's is a badminton court.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the entire college.

content.Placements: Only 10-15% of students are offered placements. Faculty members make zero efforts in helping students the same. Students find their own internships. Since college force students to come to college and maintain 75% attendance. Students don't really get enough time to work on their skills and find internship.
content.Infrastructure: UPID doesn't have its own hostel. Students have to manage on their own. Locality is the worst. Bad food quality and a limited menu. No canteen for faculty members. No sports and no games. It's like this college don't want students to be physically fit and active. They just want students to complete the assignments and maintain 75% attendance.

hostel_campus.college_name: U.P. Institute of Design Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Average infrastructure but great hands-on experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi only comes in a very small range and the labs, classrooms, and library are okay the classrooms have AC which is fully in working condition, the class also has lockers, and the classrooms get locked after 5 pm which is great too, the library has all the necessary books and its easy to get them issue. There is no hostel, the canteen has home-cooked food, there's a first aid kit, as for sports and games there's is a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the entire college.
reviews.review_text: UPID doesn't have its own hostel. Students have to manage on their own. Locality is the worst. Bad food quality and a limited menu. No canteen for faculty members. No sports and no games. It's like this college don't want students to be physically fit and active. They just want students to complete the assignments and maintain 75% attendance.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of college and faculty members .
reviews.review_text: UPID don't have their own hostel students have to manage on their own. Locality is the worst. The faculty members don't really teach anything they just give the assignments. And for theories they ask students to make PPT on those topics and explain them. Bad food quality limited menu. No canteen, no sports and no games. It's like this college don't want students to be physically fit and active they just want students to complete the assignments and maintain 75% attendance.

reviews.review_heading: The Best College of AKTU university in greater Noida is KCC ITM.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of College got NAAC grade. The quality of fresh water is excellent in comparing to other colleges. The quality of mess canteen and medical facilities, sports games is best. The quality of food in the mess of College is best because the shef of our college is professional in food cooking 
.

reviews.review_heading: Actually when I came first time in this college the infrastructure, faculty is not so good
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is well developed and neat and clean. Wi-Fi facility available in college as well as in hostel rooms also in every hostel wing. Classrooms, technically are well developed and benches are also modern. Quality of food in hostel is not so good like every hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College and hostel and teacher and many more but good facility.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are clean n hygienic, food provided in hostel mess are good and the best food is available in college Our college has good infrastructure, with four floors, a big library, and many classrooms. Condition of the classrooms was bad, But, the renovation of the college is under progress.

reviews.review_heading: This college is excellent for the MBA course and you can join to secure your future.
reviews.review_text: Our labs were excellent. There were a lot of HP desktop computers. Wi-Fi always worked in good condition. Our classrooms were huge. There were more than 70 seats in the classroom. The library was good. The hostel facilities were not available. The canteen was too good. Staff members of the canteen were very polite.

college_info.intro:
Amity University Raipur courses are providd in a range of specialisations and streams. The university's flagship programmes are Master of Business Administration (MBA) and Bachelor of Technology (BTech). These courses are often in demand, with the students being required to appear for the entrance tests to be eligible for the same. The university offers BTech programme for the duration of 4 years. Amity Raipur provides BTech specialisations like CSE, Biotechnology, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engieering, Information Technology, Robotics & Automation, and others.
Students can see the table below to know more about Amity University Raipur popular programmes:

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Honours/ Research) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the campus is good.

content.Placements: The BBA course sees around 70 percent placements and roles, mainly in sales, business development, and HR. 80 percent of the students have secured internships in finance, marketing, and HR. Companies like Flipkart, Renault, etc., hire students for major roles like sales, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is totally good for the BBA and hostel, and the facilities provided are also good. Facilities in the hostel have been improved and now they take proper care of everything. There are useless restrictions that are imposed on students that need to be stopped.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The university has a great performance in Chhattisgarh.

content.Placements: Approximately 75% of students are placed at the university every year. The highest package goes across 30 LPA, and the lowest package goes across 8 LPA. The university provides different courses for the students to make their future bright as well, and the CRC department of the university is helpful for the students.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at the university are excellent, like unlimited Wi-Fi, good furniture, an AC dining hall, a green campus, and good infrastructure. The classroom has ACs. There is a cleanliness on the campus, and it has a ragging-free atmosphere, is under CCTV surveillance, and provides medical facilities, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication (Honours/ Research) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great learning and experience from Amity.

content.Placements: The placements provided at Amity are good. Top media houses visited the campus for placement. The package ranges from 4-7 LPA. Many students from my batch went for higher education. Internship opportunities are provided to the students based on their interests and skills.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided for learning is excellent. The studio is equipped with all the necessary equipment for our learning. The classrooms have Wi-Fi. The library has books for all departments. It has computers for e-learning where students can access journals. The hostel facility is good. They provide two sharing rooms. There are 3 hostels currently. There are common rooms, game rooms, and a dance room for students' engagement. The mess area is quite big, accommodation for the students. The food provided is to suits everyone's taste. The medical staff is available for the students' help.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Well-structured curriculum and good placements.

content.Placements: In my batch out of the strength of 79 students, almost 40 percent of students got an on-campus placement with the highest offer of 19 LPA and an average of 5 LPA. 30 percent of students went for higher education. Top roles offered in our courses include Software Developer, Data Analyst, Software Engineer, etc. Recruiting companies include LearningRoutes, PlanetSpark, QSpiders, IBM, Genpact, and more.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, our college has a good infrastructure having all the required labs, with high-speed internet connections available for all the students. Our college has a wide range of books available in high-class libraries and has a vast collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. The hostel facilities are designed for our comfort and convenience, offering both AC and non-AC rooms with essential amenities like Wi-Fi, Laundry, and security.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B.(Hons.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Insight of Amity University Raipur.

content.Placements: My batch in total has 30 students. As we are freshers, we know about our seniors who have been placed in huge companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Google, etc. The average package is 500,000 per year, and the highest goes up to 2,500,000 or something. The lowest can be 200,000 per year to start, then it can increase according to your performance in the future.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided by the college is top-notch. The library has vast resources, fully equipped sports facilities, and well-maintained classrooms, making it a conducive environment for learning and recreation. The campus design, with its modern amenities and green spaces, ensures a balance between study and relaxation.

admission_overview.title: Amity University Raipur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Amity University Raipur admission is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CUET, etc. for admission to specific courses. Amity University Raipur offers more than 30 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams like Engineering, Architecture, Design, Law, Management, Commerce, Applied and Creative Arts, Vocational Education, Media, Information and Communication Technology, and Education. Students can apply for admission online. Read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, and admission process for Amity Raipur. Download Amity Raipur Brochure

eligibility_selection.title: Amity University Raipur Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Amity Raipur course admissions generally begin in January every year. Admission to most of the courses at the university is entrance exam-based. However, the university also offers a provision of direct admission to several courses. Check below popular Amity Raipur courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/ Biology

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics/ Biology
courses_table.selection_criteria: AMCAT or JEE Main National/ State Entrance Exam or CUET UG
CAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ GRE/ Amity Test + Skype Interview instead of personal appearance at campus CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/GMAT/ NMAT/ AMCAT + Test + PI for MBA International

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Maths/ Computer Science/ Information Practice/ Computer Applications/ Multimedia & Web Technology/ Data Management/ Application/ Web Application (provision of a bridge course in Maths available for non-Maths background applicants)

Graduation with Maths or graduation with Maths at Class 12 level/ BSc IT/ BCA Candidates with no Mathematics at Class 12 or graduation level, can still apply, by availing the option of a bridge course as per the norms of the university

faqs.answer: Candidates can check Amity University Raipur's 2023 cutoff on the university's official website. The website has an admissions or academics section where you can find information about the cutoff
faqs.question: Where can a candidate check Amity University Raipur cutoff 2023?

faqs.answer: Admissions for the Ph.D. programme are entrance-based. Amity University, Raipur conducts an entrance test. However, candidates who have cleared an All India National Level Competitive Examination like NET of UGC / CSIR / ICAR (ASRB) / GPAT / ICMR / GATE / DST - INSPIRE within the last 2 years from the time of applying for Ph.D. at Amity, shall be exempted from the written test of the Ph.D. The selection process is on the basis of the documents uploaded by them with the application form. Candidates will have to apply online mode only.
faqs.question: What is the admission process to apply for Ph.D in Amity University, Raipur?

faqs.answer: Amity University is one of the top B- schools of Raipur. Their eligibility criteria is very simple. You have to complete your undergraduate in any stream from a recognised university by UGC with at least 60% marks. Along with UG marks they are also asking for management exams such as MAT, CAT, XAT, ATMA etc. They have set the cutoff at 75 percent in CAT exam.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Amity University Raipur?

faqs.answer: Yes, Aspirants with at least 70 percentile for CAT/ MAT are eligible for direct admission at Amity Raipur and stand exempted from the entrance exam. Only GD & PI will be conducted for eligible candidates. Besides, candidates can also take regular admission in MBA programme based on their score in CAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ GRE/ Amity Test. Shortlisted aspirants are then required to come for a personal interview round.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Amity University Raipur for MBA?

paragraphs: Amity Raipur admissionsstart with online application followed by selection and admission confirmation. Students are first required to register for the course of their choice. Check below theAmity Raipur admission process:

Application process:The mode of application is online. Students can go to the Amity Raipur admission portal and register themselves to start the application process. The form has to be submitted with documents.

Selection rounds:The university conducts its entrance exam, AMCAT for shortlisting candidates. Apart from this,Amity Raipur also accepts national-level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CUET UG, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses.

Admission confirmation:After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay theAmity University Raipur feesto confirm their seat in the university.
Download Amity University Raipur Prospectus

faqs.question: What is the MBA eligibility at Amity University Raipur?
faqs.answer: A pass in bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate is required to apply for the MBA course. The minimum aggregate is not specified for MBA International. Additionally, candidates need to pass CAT/ MAT/ GMAT/ GRE/ Amity Test followed by a Skype Interview in lieu of a personal appearance at the campus.Aspirants with at least 70 percentile for CAT/ MAT are eligible for direct admission and stand exempted from the entrance exam. Only GD & PI will be conducted for eligible candidates.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Amity University Raipur MBA course?

CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/GMAT/ NMAT/ AMCAT and Test followed by a personal interview round is required for MBA International admission.Aspirants with at least 70 percentile for CAT/ MAT are eligible for direct admission and stand exempted from the entrance exam. Only GD & PI will be conducted for eligible candidates.

faqs.question: What is the minimum cutoff for MBA at Amity University Raipur 2023?
faqs.answer: Amity University Raipur for MBA is asking for more than 60% marks in undergraduate in any stream from any university recognised by UGC. They are also asking for management exams such as CAT, MAT, XAT, ATMA etc. The minimum percentile for CAT is set by them is at least 75percentile.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Amity University Raipur admission?
faqs.answer: The last date has not been specified by the university for admission. Amity Raipur course admissions for all of its courses is either done based on merit or via other entrance exams. Check below the complete Amity Raipur admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Raipur.Selection rounds:The university conducts its own entrance exam-AMCAT for shortlisting candidates. Besides, Amity Raipur also accepts national-level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CUET UG, JEE Main, etc.Admission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Amity University Raipur?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity Raipur provides direct admission to candidates fufiling the below-mentioned criteria:Candidates must pass Class 12 (CBSE/ ISC/ State Boards) with at least 80% aggregate for direct admission to UG courses. Aspirants eligible for direct admission get exemption from the entrance exam.Aspirants with at least 70 percentile in CAT/ MAT exam are eligible for direct admission to MBA course. Such candidates are exempted from entrance test and can directly come for GDPI round.Direct admission is not applicable on non-MBA course.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Amity Raipur?
faqs.answer: Amity University Raipur admissions are entrance-based. The university conducts its entrance exam, AMCAT for shortlisting candidates. Apart from this, Amity Raipur also accepts national-level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, CUET UG, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: When will the CMAT result 2025 be released?
faqs.answer: CMAT result 2025 was declared by the National Testing Agency (NTA) on February 13, 2025. The final answer key was released on February 14, 2025 The NTA does not announce the CMAT result date beforehand but releases the scorecard within a month of the exam date. In between the CMAT exam and the result announcement, the NTA releases official answer keys and verifies objections raised by candidates.

placement_data.title: Amity University Raipur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Amity University Raipur placement cell plays a very important role as it connects the students with industries from technology to management. It also provides training programs, aptitud development, mock interviews and more. Over 150 recruiters took part in the 2025 Amity University placement season. Further, 22% students were placed in Business Consulting followed by IT/ITES in which 20% students were placed during Amity University Raipur placements 2025. Some of the roles offered were Analyst, Data Scientist, HR & Marketing Officer, Software Developer, Legal Exec, and others.

hostel_campus.college_name: Amity University Raipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Amity university provides apartment-style accommodation facility with suites of bedrooms that share a common lounge and bathroom.The rooms are well-lit and well-ventilated, with geysers in every bathroom and TV set in the common room for entertainment. The university offers free laundry service.

Amity university provides apartment-style accommodation facility with suites of bedrooms that share a common lounge and bathroom.The rooms are well-lit and well-ventilated, with geysers in every bathroom and TV set in the common room for entertainment. The university offers free laundry service.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Physics Lab, Biotechnology Lab, Media Lab, Engineering Lab

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the campus is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is totally good for the BBA and hostel, and the facilities provided are also good. Facilities in the hostel have been improved and now they take proper care of everything. There are useless restrictions that are imposed on students that need to be stopped.

reviews.review_heading: The university has a great performance in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the university are excellent, like unlimited Wi-Fi, good furniture, an AC dining hall, a green campus, and good infrastructure. The classroom has ACs. There is a cleanliness on the campus, and it has a ragging-free atmosphere, is under CCTV surveillance, and provides medical facilities, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning and experience from Amity.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided for learning is excellent. The studio is equipped with all the necessary equipment for our learning. The classrooms have Wi-Fi. The library has books for all departments. It has computers for e-learning where students can access journals. The hostel facility is good. They provide two sharing rooms. There are 3 hostels currently. There are common rooms, game rooms, and a dance room for students' engagement. The mess area is quite big, accommodation for the students. Th...

reviews.review_heading: Well-structured curriculum and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Overall, our college has a good infrastructure having all the required labs, with high-speed internet connections available for all the students. Our college has a wide range of books available in high-class libraries and has a vast collection of books, research papers, and digital resources. The hostel facilities are designed for our comfort and convenience, offering both AC and non-AC rooms with essential amenities like Wi-Fi, Laundry, and security.

reviews.review_heading: Insight of Amity University Raipur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided by the college is top-notch. The library has vast resources, fully equipped sports facilities, and well-maintained classrooms, making it a conducive environment for learning and recreation. The campus design, with its modern amenities and green spaces, ensures a balance between study and relaxation.

reviews.review_heading: Details of Amity University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is well-furnished with projectors and air-conditioned classrooms. In hostel, there are 3 rooms for 6 students sharing, one washroom and one bathroom. Mess is provided but not good in taste. The quality of food is bad. Although, it's good for making fun memories.

reviews.review_heading: Once an amitian always an amitian.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure at this college is good. It has many facilities, including Wi-Fi, a library, and an auditorium. The quality and quantity of the food are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Very pleasant campus with all the facilities available.
reviews.review_text: As being a biotechnology student, we are provided with very good lab facilities with all the necessities available! Lab hours are also scheduled in a very efficient manner! Wi-Fi is provided 24*7! Classrooms are big with a strength of 60 students! Medical facilities are also available! We have a canteen and food trucks in our campus!

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The maintenance of classrooms and labs is very good and the canteen is hygienic. Our college is also good at sports. Wi-Fi equipment is provided on campus. The library is very big with many authors available there. The hostel facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Great facilities, and the campus is so good.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure with a good campus building, and there are washrooms and a parking area. The college offers facilities like free Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and well-equipped labs. The library is useful to students, and the hostels and mess are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, experience during studies was good.
reviews.review_text: Transportation, air-conditioned classrooms, a mess, and a canteen were the facilities, and infrastructure was newly built. The campus was small and far from the city. The quality of the food was not good. Students got food poisoning due to the bad and unhealthy food. Sports and games competitions used to take place, like badminton and basketball, majorly.

reviews.review_heading: Nice campus and has great facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities for students. The facilities provided are separate hostels for boys and girls with free Wi-Fi, good classrooms, labs and a well-stocked library. The mess is hygienic. The infrastructure is good with proper buildings and a pleasant environment.

reviews.review_heading: A brief information about Amity University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and a library are available and the campus is full of AC. Everything is good, but the quality of the food is the worst. We have a canteen, but most of the time it won't have food to buy, and outside food is not allowed on campus, even if it is homely food.

reviews.review_heading: Best private college in Chhattisgarh for our BBA course.
reviews.review_text: There are beautiful classrooms on our campus, with windows and A.C. All students are allowed to access free Wi-Fi. Overall, the infrastructure of the campus is very good. The hostel also has good infrastructure, providing facilities 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Amity university review by Seven Noel.
reviews.review_text: The syllabus is well structured and covers a good amount of all subjects and appropriate knowledge. As a hosteler, the food quality is average, the sports facilities are not that up-to-date, and the sports complex is not that developed but is improving .

For MBA International, aspirants can apply with XAT/ MAT/ CMAT /GMAT/ NMAT / AMCAT score. Selected candidates are further called for a personal interview round for selection.

The university shortlists candidates for BBA course based on merit in the last qualifying exam or CUET-UG score. In case, the candidate is unable to pay fee within the stipulated time, the admission stands cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission to Amity Raipur .

Amity Raipur BTech fee for a four-year BTech programme range between INR 3.84 Lacs and INR 5.76 lakh. The course-fee varies from each BTech specialisation. faqs.answer:
A:    VIT Vellore and School of Science and Humanities, SRM IST, Chennai both are renowned universities for B.Com. However, in terms of affordability, VIT Vellore is a better option since the total tuition fee for VIT Vellore is INR 165,000 - INR 270,000 and the total tuition fee for B.Com at School of Science and Humanities, SRM IST, Chennai is INR 18,000 - INR 390,000. 
In the total fees that students generally end up paying the university or the college, various other components are also included, such as the exam fee, application fee, lab and other charges.
faqs.question: Which college is more affordable for B.Com among VIT Vellore and School of Science and Humanities, SRM IST, Chennai?

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA in Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good campus to explore. College life is amazing.

review_content.Placements: I am from the 2023-2026 BCA data science batch at SRM Kattankulathur, and honestly, placements have been pretty decent for our course. Around 80-85% of students got placed last year. The highest package I heard is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 4.5 LPA. Big companies like Infosys, Cognizant, TCS, Capgemini, and Wipro visited the college for placements. Also, quite a few students got internships, i.e., around 70% in companies like Zoho, Virtusa, and HCL, and some even through a coding platform.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is honestly top-notch. We have good labs, strong Wi-Fi in academic buildings, clean classrooms with projectors, and a huge library. There are plenty of systems for practicing coding. The campus is fully digital and pretty convenient. Hostel life is good too. I stay in the non-AC block, and it is comfortable and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members of science and humanities - B.Com at SRM.

review_content.Placements: In my course B.Com, almost 80% of students are getting placed every year. Students who are interested in banking jobs are highly likely to get a job as most of the companies that visit are banking institutions. Right after finishing B.Com, the highest package will be 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Internships are not exactly provided by the placement office in our college. Students have to search for internships on their own and the college will just approve it. Top roles offered in B.Com are analyst, accountant, sales analyst, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Compared to the infrastructure of the engineering departments, the classrooms of B.Com are average. Free Wi-Fi is available to all the students. Central library at SRM is the biggest asset of the college. Any student, faculty member, or research scholar can have access to the books present in the library. It is huge and massive and has books of all genres and related courses. The food in the canteens is top-notch. There are so many varieties of foods available for students of all sorts of ethnicity and the population is diverse.

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses can I do after a D.Ed.? Should I do a BSc or B.Ed?

faqs.answer: The last date for submission of the SRMJEEE 2024 application form was June 15, 2024. The SRMJEEE is the entrance exam for admission into a BTech and MTech course at SRM University Chennai. The university offers over 80 UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma courses. Admission for most of the courses is on an entrance basis, and university admission considers national-level entrance examinations such as CAT, MAT, XAT, TANCET, and NATA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the last date to apply for School of Science and Humanities SRM admission?

faqs.answer: To gain entry into the M.Sc. degree programs offered at the School of Science and Humanities, SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST), the university mostly accepts a valid SRM Joint Entrance Examination (SRMJEEH) score. This examination takes place for a number of postgraduate programs including those under the Science and Humanities faculties. Moreover, some courses may have their own entrance components, like the SRM Future Skills Test for some specializations such as Applied Data Science.

review_summary.college_name: SRM School of Science and Humanities Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Defence and Strategic Studies - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This provides a comprehensive, honest insight into campus life, academics, and opportunities.

content.Placements: Most recruitment is in GCL and Texco. Internships are offered in cybercrime, ethical hacking, and criminal law.
content.Infrastructure: There is a small section of books in the central library. Classrooms are very good, and there is an excellent infrastructure in the department. The hostel is very nice with a neat and clean mess, bathrooms, and rooms, along with top-level security in the hostel. The quality of food is very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and well-experienced. They are also very friendly and supportive. This course is very helpful for students who are preparing for CDS, SSB, UPSC, and other competitive exams. There are six semester exams in three years, and the pass percentage is 95%.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: B.A. JMC at SRM Kattankulatur.

content.Placements: Weekly alumni talks help students build connections with people in the industry. Most students graduate and get placed through referral. Packages vary from 3 LPA - 7 LPA again depending on campus placements or referral. Recruiting companies are The Hindu, TOI, and Zoho. Roles offered are journalists, editors, HR, PR, and communication roles.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have projectors, but ventilation can be a problem because there are no air-conditioners in this block. Labs have PCs, cameras, and microphones for recording and inbuilt editing software. Hostel food is good and hygienic, but in time is strict, and that can pose an issue.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty members of science and humanities - B.Com at SRM.

content.Placements: In my course B.Com, almost 80% of students are getting placed every year. individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Applied Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great college, but it totally depends on how you want to shape your life for good or bad.

content.Placements: SRM has decent placements, with about 80-90% of students getting placed. For 2024, the highest package was 52 LPA, while the average for most students was around 4-7 LPA, depending on the program. Top companies like Microsoft, Google, Amazon, IBM, and TCS recruit for roles like Data Scientist, Analyst, and Machine Learning Engineer. Many students also get internships in companies like Deloitte and Infosys, making the Data Science program a good choice due to the demand for skilled professionals.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, but you don’t have enough time to complete all the programs within the lab hours themselves. You have to work on your own laptop to complete it all and learn a bit. Wi-Fi is really good; you can download a 1GB movie within 5 minutes. As for classrooms, they’re average for the FSH building. Hostel facilities are good and totally depend on the amount you pay for a better hostel. The food is average, like in any other college. You will get free consultations and 50% off on medical tests if you are an SRM student.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for School of Science and Humanities SRM admission?
faqs.answer: The last date for submission of the SRMJEEE 2024 application form was June 15, 2024. The SRMJEEE is the entrance exam for admission into a BTech and MTech course at SRM University Chennai.The university offers over 80 UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma courses. Admission for most of the courses is on an entrance basis, and university admission considers national-level entrance examinations such as CAT, MAT, XAT, TANCET, and NATA.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by the School of Science and Humanities SRM for admission to M.Sc.?
faqs.answer: To gain entry into the M.Sc. degree programs offered at the School of Science and Humanities, SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST), the university mostly accepts a valid SRM Joint Entrance Examination (SRMJEEH) score. This examination takes place for a number of postgraduate programs including those under the Science and Humanities faculties. Moreover, some courses may have their own entrance components, like the SRM Future Skills Test for some specializations such as Applied Data Science.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in School of Science and Humanities, SRM Kattankulathur?
faqs.answer: Admission to School of Science and Humanities at SRM IST Kattankulathur is generally considered moderately easy for most undergraduate programs often based on merit in 10+2 examinations although it is highly reputed institution. While competitive for top courses direct admission is available for high performers & management quota seats are also an option.

faqs.question: How to get admission in School of Science and Humanities at SRM IST, Chennai?
faqs.answer: Admission to School of Science and Humanities at SRM IST Chennai for 2026 is primarily based on SRM Joint Entrance Examination for PG courses while UG admissions often consider merit in qualifying exams. Application process is online with fee per phase. Direct admission is possible for high performing students, board toppers & athletes.

reviews.review_heading: Enough infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and amenities are all good. Daily biometric attendance is mandatory. Wi-Fi is available only in the labs and classrooms. And every classroom has its own projector. Library cards are given to access the library. Mess and canteen food are good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good at this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good around the campus; the campus is spread over 15 acres of space, and there are two buildings. The classrooms, labs, and library are overall good. They separate 4 acres for sports fields. The hostel is available if you are from the north and can manage South Indian food.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and satisfied with the faculty members.

faqs.question: Does JD institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai conducts entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    JD Institute of Fashion Technolgy Mumbai admission is based on performance of the candidates in the entrance exam for BSc and MSc courses. The institute conducts GAT to shortlist candidates for admission. All prospective candidates must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to appear for the entrance- exam.The General Aptitude Test (GAT) is conducted in two rounds. In the first round, candidates have to appear for a situation test. Applicants who perform well in the situation test will be shortlisted for the second round which is the personal interview round. Based on the performance of the candidates in both rounds, the candidates will be given the final admission offer.

admission_overview.college_name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai Admission process 2025

paragraphs: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai admissionsare merit and entrance-based. The institute conducts GAT or General Aptitude Test to select candidates for admission to degree courses.JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbaioffers courses at UG, PG and diploma levels in the Design stream. The institute offers BSc and MSc in affiliation withSun Rise University. Candidates can apply for the preferred course on the official website of JDIFT.

JDIFT offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates seeking admission to JDIFT Mumbai must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria. Below areJD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

JDIFT Mumbai admissionis merit-based and all the prospective candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria for selection. Admissions are currently open for JDIFT. Interested candidates can check out the step-wiseJDIFT admission processbelow:
STEP 1: JDIFT Application Process

Candidates must first apply for the course of their choice. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 5,000 to register for the course.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute evaluates the applications of the candidates and selects them based on their merit. Aspirants also need to appear for the General Aptitude Test for admission to UG and PG courses. The test assesses candidates' existing creative abilities. Candidates can also contact the academic counsellor for any query.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection is completed, candidates are informed about their admission. Selected aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats in the institute.

college_info.intro:
IIITDM Kacheepuram offers UG, PG, and doctoral-level programmes in the fields of Engineering, Design, Science, and many others. At the UG level, the institute offers its flagship four-year full-time BTech programme across five specialisations. The UG course is offered in a full-time mode. It is of four-year duration and is further divided into eight semesters. For admission to this programme, aspirants need to have a valid score of JEE Main and participate in the JoSAA/CSAB counselling for seat allotment. review_content.Placements: The placement rate is 80%, the highest package is 45 LPA, and the lowest is 9 LPA. AMD, Intel, Google, startup companies, JPMorgan, and some others are among the top recruiting companies. For campus placement, I can give an average rate of about 80%, with two roles being VLSI engineer, electronic design engineer, and some others.
review_content.Infrastructure: I can give 4 stars, which is more than enough. Classrooms and library, I can give 4-4.5. The mess is below average. The medical facility is good. Sports and games, I can give 4.5.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college to study if you have a lower rank to join NITs.

review_content.Placements: 35 LPA is the highest. I don't know the lowest package. Overall average placements. Many students do internships, such as a paid internship, because they are important and a good thing. The ECE department is good here, and you can be taught by good lecturers, except that some of them are common.
review_content.Infrastructure: Small rooms for freshers. Building a new one until then, average rooms. Food is good. Sports are the best thing in college. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel rooms, whereas you get Ethernet, which does not often work properly, but you can get Wi-Fi in college.

overview_faqs.question: What is the IIITDM Kancheepuram BTech fee?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for BTech is INR 7.2 lakh at Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram. Aspirants need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat in the institute.

overview_faqs.question: Is there CSE at IIIT Kancheepuram?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram offers a four-year full-time BTech course at the undergraduate level. IIITDM Kancheepuram offers BTech in four specialisations and Computer Science and Engineering is one of them. IIITDM Kancheepuram BTech CSE admission is based on candidates' performance in the JEE Main entrance exam, followed by JoSAA counselling.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the fee for IIITDM Kancheepuram M.Tech course?
overview_faqs.answer: The Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram MTech fee ranges between INR 2.2 lakh - INR 7.3 lakh. This fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Apart from the mentioned tuition fee, candidates also need to pay a one-time fee of INR 5,000. The cne-time payment includes the admission fee, certificate/ thesis fee, student welfare fee, infrastructure development fee, alumni life membership fee, publication fee/ library fee and cultural fee. Also, candidates must pay the registration fee of INR 1,000 while registering in the IIITM Kancheepuram's official website.

overview_faqs.question: How much is the fee for IIITDM Kancheepuram M.Des course?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for MDes is INR 2 lakh at IIITDM Kancheepuram. This fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Selected candidates need to pay the course fees to confirm their seat.

review_summary.college_name: IIITDM Kancheepuram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am student at IIITDM Kancheepuram.

content.Placements: From my knowledge, Chennai has high opportunities. If we know things like coding languages, we can take the help of the professors and build two to three projects, then apply for the internships. On average, people will get 6 LPA - 9 LPA package. I heard from seniors that he got a job that pays Rs 20,000 - Rs 30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is fine, and they will clean the washrooms daily. They will also clean the floors. The quality of food and taste is also okay but once or twice every 2 weeks, the mess food is not that much tasty and well prepared. They will provide high-protein foods like paneer and dal. For right now, there is no chicken curry for free so we have to pay the bill. Sports are available like cricket, football, badminton, volleyball, basketball, cricket, chess, carrom, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Smart Manufacturing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure and friendly campus vibe.

content.Placements: Placement rate for B.Tech in smart manufacturing is reported as 28.6% ongoing. According to last year 2024, a much higher figure was indicated, with 73% of smart manufacturing batch placed. The highest package offered is 12.2LPA in 2025, average package offered is 6.75LPA in 2024, and the lowest package offered is 6LPA, according to 2024 data. Top recruiting companies are Amazon, Adobe, Samsung, Google, Virtusa, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Lecture halls are technologically equipped to support dynamic discussions. Group discussion and interview room support placement activities. The entire campus, including the academic blocks and hostels Wi-Fi is enabled. LAN connections are also available in hostels. We have advanced department labs. The institute has specialized labs across disciplines.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good, faculty is .

content.Placements: The placement rate is 80%, the highest package is 45 LPA, and the lowest is 9 LPA. AMD, Intel, Google, startup companies, JPMorgan, and some others are among the top recruiting companies. For campus placement, I can give an average rate of about 80%, with two roles being VLSI engineer, electronic design engineer, and some others.
content.Infrastructure: I can give 4 stars, which is more than enough. Classrooms and library, I can give 4-4.5. The mess is below average. The medical facility is good. Sports and games, I can give 4.5.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college to study if you have a lower rank to join NITs.

content.Placements: 35 LPA is the highest. I don't know the lowest package. Overall average placements. Many students do internships, such as a paid internship, because they are important and a good thing. The ECE department is good here, and you can be taught by good lecturers, except that some of them are common.
content.Infrastructure: Small rooms for freshers. Building a new one until then, average rooms. Food is good. Sports are the best thing in college. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel rooms, whereas you get Ethernet, which does not often work properly, but you can get Wi-Fi in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Mess food is below average.

content.Placements: 80% is the placement rate. The highest package is 45 LPA, and the lowest is 9 LPA. AMD, Intel, Google, startup companies, JPMorgan, and some others come for campus placement. I can give an average of about 80%. Roles offered are VLSI engineer, electronic design engineer, and some others.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi (Ethernet) is, I can give 4 stars more than enough, classrooms and library I can give 4-4.5 stars, mess is below average, medical facility is good, sports and games I can give 4.5, sometimes they have Ethernet access. There is one canteen in college, and the price is affordable.

admission_overview.college_name: IIITDM Kancheepuram IIITDM Kancheepuram Admission 2026: Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility & Application

admission_overview.title: IIITDM Kancheepuram Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: IIITDM Kancheepuram admissions are entrance-based. The insitute offers admission to its flagship BTech course based on JEE Main scores followed by JoSAA Counselling. The institute also accepts scores in GATE, CEED, etc. for admission. IIITDM Kancheepuram conducts a written test followed by PI round for admission to PhD. The institute offers BTech at UG and MTech and MDes programmes at the PG level. Aspirants can fill out the form online for the respective entrance exams and courses.

eligibility_selection.title: IIITDM Kancheepuram Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: IIITDM Kancheepuram admission to courses is entrance-based. Admission to BTech is via JEE Main scores of the candidates. The institute accepts GATE for MTech and CEED for MDes programmes. IIITDM also conducts a written test for non-GATE qualified candidates for admission to MTech. Aspirants must also meet eligibility to apply for a course. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for IIITDM Kancheepuram courses: Class 12 with PCM with a minimum of 75% aggregate

faqs.answer: Aspirants can get admission in M.Tech at IIITDM Kancheepuram without GATE scores. Candidates need to appear for a written test conducted by the institute for admission to M.Tech programme. The results of the test are announced on the institute's website.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in M.Tech at IIITDM Kancheepuram without GATE?

faqs.answer: Aspirants must pass BE/BTech in relevant subject with a minimum 60% aggregate or 6.0 CGPA (55% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PwD candidates) to apply for M.Tech programme at IIITDM Kancheepuram. Aspirants must have documents proving their eligibility for verification.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for M.Tech at IIITDM Kancheepuram?

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. As per the IIIT Allahabad cutoff 2023, the Last Round closing rank for BTech ranged between 5924 and 9558, among which Information Technology was the most competitive specialisation. The Round 1 closing rank for BTech ranged between 4817 and 8428 for BTech. So, considering the previous year Round 1 and the Last Round closing ranks, candidates seeking admission to IIIT Allahabad must secure a rank over and above 4800 and 9600 for the General ALL India category candidates. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the 2023 Last Round closing ranks for IIIT Allahabad to get an idea of the ranks required for all the BTech courses offered at this institute: CourseRound 1Last Round B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering84289558B.Tech. in Information Technology48175924B.Tech. in Information Technology (Business Informatics)51626587
faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get IIIT Allahabad?

faqs.answer: IIITDM Kancheepuram accepts DASA UG score for the admission to BTech courses. IIITDM Kancheepuram current admission are scheduled to be announced in 2025. Meawhile, the IIITDM Kancheepuram cutoff 2023 was ranged from 412 to 954 for the General AI category candidates. As per the cutoff data, we can assume that for the upcoming session, the required rank will stand between a range of 300 to 900. And, for the BTech in CSE specifically, candidates have to acquire a rank nearly at 500.
faqs.question: What rank should I score to get a seat for B.Tech at IIITDM Kancheepuram?

paragraphs: IIITDM Kancheepuram admission for BTech us through JoSSA/CSAB based on JEE(Main) rank. The institute opens the application portal online. Candidates can follow the below steps to get a seat in the institute:
1: IIITDM Kancheepuram Application process.

The UG and PG admission requires the candidate to fill out the application form by registering using the course-wise entrance exams. In case of BTech, the applicants have to go to the official site and the JEE Main. Aspirants need to apply for GATE for MTech programme. Candidates also need to register on the institute's website for MTech, MDes and PhD courses.
2: Selection Rounds.

Admission to the BTech course is based on JEE Main rank of the candidates. The selection for MTech and MDes programmes is based on GATE and CEED scores, respectively. The institute conducts a written test for non-GATE candidates. IIITDM Kancheepuram also conducts a written test to PhD programme.
Applicants also need to pass a personal interview round for MDes and PhD courses.
3: Release of Cutoff list, Counselling & Admission Confirmation

Aspirants must score equal or aboveIIITDM Kancheepuram cutoff. Selected candidates are called for counselling conducted by different bodies. BTech applicants are allotted seat via JoSAA/ CSAB Counselling. GATE aspirants are allotted seat via CCMT Counsellig. The institute conducts Spot Admission round in case the seats remain vacant after counselling. Selected aspirants need to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

IIITDM Kancheepuram fees range from INR 2 lakh to INR 7 lakh. The fees include multiple components such as a certificate/thesis fee, student welfare fee, alumni life membership fee, etc. IIIT Kancheepuram offers 500+ seats for its UG an PG course. Find below IITDM Kancheepuram fees and seats:

placement_report.college_name: IIITDM Kancheepuram Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IIIT Kancheepuram Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: IIITDM Kancheepuram has concluded its placement season for 2025. The overall placement rate achieved during the 2025 placement season stood at 61.9% , however, the percentage of offers received was 76.2%. A total of 260 students registered for the placements, out of which 198 received placement offers. Overall 161 students secured placements during the IIIT Kancheepuram placement season. The highest package provided to students during IIITDM Kancheepuram placements was INR 32.57 LPA.

The institute has also released the course-wise and department-wise placement data for 2025. The average package offered for BTech, MTech, and MDes batch was INR 9.42 LPA, INR 10.20 LPA, and INR 6.59 LPA , respectively. The number of offers given to BTech students was 176 additionally, MTech and MDes received 14 and 8 offers , respectively.
