description: IIITDM Kancheepuram cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIITDM Kancheepuram JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

In this section, candidates can view the last 9 years of IIITDM Kancheepuram JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links provided below to understand the past years' trends.

IIITDM Kancheepuram JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIITDM Kancheepuram CSE cutoff 2025 was 20190 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branches, such as ECE and Mechanical, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission were 24892 and 45791, respectively for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating co

For the General AI category students, the IIITDM Kancheepuram B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 20190 and 73115 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 20190 and 22123, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIITDM Kancheepuram. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIITDM Kancheepuram to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIITDM Kancheepuram. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence) and M.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering (Intelligent Mechanical Systems Design) with last round cutoff scores of 483 and 442, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 483. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 330 and 420 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at IIITDM Kancheepuram - Indian Institute of Information Technology Design & Manufacturing. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

IIITDM Kancheepuram also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. As per cutoff 2022, the last round closing ranks for the top courses including B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was 590 and for B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was 412 for the General category All India candidates. Candidates seeking admission to IIITDM Kancheepuram can refer to the table given below to check out the DASA UG previous year cutoffs for the General category students:

Considering the last round of IIITDM Kancheepuram CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence) and Mechanical Engineering (Intelligent Mechanical Systems Design), witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Electronics and Communication Engineering (Microelectronics and VLSI Systems) and Mechanical Engineering (Smart Manufacturing) had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, IIITDM Kancheepuram is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #151-200 in the NIRF 2025 under the Engineering category. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around IIITDM Kancheepuram rankings:

rankings.highlight: 14th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Chennai In 2025

nirf.description:
IIITDM Kancheepuram has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, IIITDM Kancheepuram fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the IIITDM Kancheepuram latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:
Read less

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, IIITDM Kancheepuram outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, IIITDM Kancheepuram fell 250 ranks to #951 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, IIITDM Kancheepuram fell 90 ranks to #312 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

facilities: Library: The institute has a central library with a large and diverse collection of books by international and national authors.
Hostel: This facility is available for boys and girls. The hostel room is equipped with a reading table, a chair, and a cot.
Dining and Shopping: The facility of dining and shopping is also available in the campus.
Medical Aid Centre: Medical assistance is available 24x7 for all the residents. The institute has also tie-ups with nearby hospitals.
ATM: An Indian Bank ATM and e-launch service facility are available for the residents.

reviews.review_heading: I am student at IIITDM Kancheepuram.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is fine, and they will clean the washrooms daily. They will also clean the floors. The quality of food and taste is also okay but once or twice every 2 weeks, the mess food is not that much tasty and well prepared. They will provide high-protein foods like paneer and dal. For right now, there is no chicken curry for free so we have to pay the bill. Sports are available like cricket, football, badminton, volleyball, basketball, cricket, chess, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and friendly campus vibe.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls are technologically equipped to support dynamic discussions. Group discussion and interview room support placement activities. The entire campus, including the academic blocks and hostels Wi-Fi is enabled. LAN connections are also available in hostels. We have advanced department labs.  The institute has specialized labs across disciplines.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, faculty is .
reviews.review_text: I can give 4 stars, which is more than enough. Classrooms and library, I can give 4-4.5. The mess is below average. The medical facility is good. Sports and games, I can give 4.5.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college to study if you have a lower rank to join NITs.
reviews.review_text: Small rooms for freshers. Building a new one until then, average rooms. Food is good. Sports are the best thing in college. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel rooms, whereas you get Ethernet, which does not often work properly, but you can get Wi-Fi in college.

reviews.review_heading: Mess food is below average.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi (Ethernet) is, I can give 4 stars more than enough, classrooms and library I can give 4-4.5 stars, mess is below average, medical facility is good, sports and games I can give 4.5, sometimes they have Ethernet access. There is one canteen in college, and the price is affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Indian Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have the best infrastructure provided by the government. We have nice AC classrooms and AC hostel rooms. We have Wi-Fi available here all the time. We also have so many libraries here and so many labs for doing experiments. We have so many varieties of food items here

reviews.review_heading: Management is responsible, and I won't recommend this institute. Join other IIITs and NITs.
reviews.review_text: Library is small and closed on Sunday. Wi-Fi works only in the academic block, and it won't work in hostels. Classrooms are limited and small. Lab is just a waste of time. Food is the worst in my opinion. No proper hygiene, and the institute will not claim its mistake. There is no lighting on campus, and water in hostels will stop at 11:00 AM. No one cares about you.

reviews.review_heading: It's good for everything, but it offers average packages only.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, and everything is good, you can participate in many sports, and the gym is also there. Washing machines are available in hostels, everything is good, labs and infrastructure are also good. I recommend you come to this beautiful campus. The campus is so good and hostels are good.

reviews.review_heading: IIITDM Kancheepuram is an overall package that is good for academics and cultural events.
reviews.review_text: In IIITDM Kancheepuram with respect to the ECE department facilities, labs are well-equipped and teachers are knowledgeable. The hostel has a LAN facility, and the library has a good Wi-Fi facility. The hostel rooms are provided with necessities, but the only issue is that it is a bit congested on one half of the hostel block for boys. The food provided is decent, there is no non-veg menu but it can be accessed by purchasing a separate token for it. Medical facilities are good. Sports are top-no...

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good, faculty members are not very good but okay. Food is not good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good some are bad (last floor). Hostel fee is compact. Medical facilities are good enough. There are 2 basketball courts, 5 badminton courts, 2 large grounds, one for cricket, one for football, 2 volleyball courts, 1 table tennis, and a kabaddi court. We also have kho-kho court and 2 table tennis courts. We have a large gym and indoor games are available like carrom and chess.

reviews.review_heading: Noteworthy placements, good infrastructure, and some good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Unlike many other colleges in IIITDM K students are required to use LAN in hostels which can be inconvenient sometimes. The library is just like any other library you might have come across. There is a separate building with 2 floors of library and other floors connection labs. Then about classrooms, all classes are not the same. Some have ACs while others don't. The messy food is nothing to worry about. There is a medical center open all the time. In sports and games, IIITDM K has been the lead...

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIITDM Kancheepuram - Indian Institute of Information Technology Design & Manufacturing.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is great, very close to nature and it is very peaceful. The hostel is good with great facilities. The only problem is the weather is a bit harsh, as it is Chennai. The college buildings and hostel buildings are very nice they are great.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a considerable college for good campus life. Best in creative and innovative ideas.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is really good in terms of infrastructure, with spacious hostel rooms and 2 students per room. In our department, classrooms are huge and well-maintained. The hostel mess is also comparatively good. We have two messes that are well maintained with hygienic food and clean plates. They ensure cleanliness in the mess and provide both South Indian and North Indian dishes in both messes.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, but placements are average.
reviews.review_text: We should really appreciate the infrastructure of laboratories, but classrooms have a very weak Wi-Fi connection. The library is a bit small. Cafeteria food is actually not so good. I have fallen sick too. Mess food is appreciable but the saddest part is we need to pay extra for non-veg, which costs around Rs. 30. Medical facilities are good with free treatment for all common illnesses and health camps too. Sports and games are also given importance with large grounds but playing equipment is le...

reviews.review_heading: I made a good decision by joining it. It has a good college life and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college is built on a total of 52 acres in which there are 4 hostels, 1 academic block, 1 laboratory block, 1 mess, 1 cafeteria, 1 sports complex, 1 provisions store which is more than enough for the campus students. The total strength is nearly 2500. we have access to Wi-Fi in all the places where buildings are there. It has good medical facilities. The mess food is average but all other things are above average. Some workers maintain the college campus regularly.

Most of these faculty members have PhD degrees from the Indian Institute of Technology.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about IIITDM Kancheepuram - Indian Institute of Information Technology Design & Manufacturing

likes.text: The top recruiting companies are Samsung, Gemini, Microsoft, Adobe, Congruent, and many others.

faqs.answer: A:    Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University fees for the BSc course might range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 3 Lacs per the specialisations candidates wants to pursue. The fees might include multiple components other than the tuition fees. Students are required to pay the BSc fees once the admission lists are out. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Sc in Swarnim University?

faqs.answer: A:    Approximately 1.3 Lacs is the yearly fee for the standard MBA programme. There would be a yearly tuition fee of around 1.5 Lacs for various specialisations, such as the MBA in Healthcare Management and the MBA in Family Business Management. Every year, this charge will change. If a student chooses to live on campus, there will be fees for the mess and hostel.Scholarships based on merit are provided by SSIU to exceptional applicants accepted into the MBA programme. Your academic standing and admission exam results determine how much of the scholarship you receive. For students who can prove they are financially struggling, SSIU also provides need-based scholarships.Financial statements and evidence of income are among the paperwork required when applying for a need-based scholarship.
faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at SSIU?

faqs.answer: A:    The seat intake for BSc in Nursing at Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University is around 60 seats. The university offers a limited number of seats for is Nursing course. Therefore candidates must make sure to apply for the programme as soon the application portal is open. Candidates must make sure to have a valid qualifiction for BSc in Nursing before applying for the course.
faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc in Nursing at SSIU?

faqs.answer: A:    SSIU admits students to its MBA programme based on results from a range of entrance exams. These entrance exams include Common Admission Test (CAT), Management Aptitude Test (MAT), Centralized Management Admission Test (CMAT) Symbiosis National Aptitude test are all written tests. There is also a university-run admission test called SSIU AdmissionsTest: SSApp!QBheader imageWe should also keep in mind that the relative weight of different entrance exams differs from year to year and for each program. In short, it's always best to go directly to the official SSIU website or phone admissions for up-to-date information. Besides entrance exam scores, SSIU also requires applicants to hold a graduation degree with at least 50 % aggregate marks.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does SSIU accept for admission to MBA?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: An average college for those who want just a degree.

review_content.Placements: 30-40% of students were placed in my course. They market 40 LPA as the highest package, but talking to some of my seniors, there are no such packages offered. Local companies recruit; they market themselves like big companies coming for recruitment, but I haven't witnessed that.
review_content.Infrastructure: The situation is very poor: no proper Wi-Fi and no proper system; they still use Windows 7, with broken mice and keyboards. The library is much better, having been renovated this year. The hostel quality was very poor, but it has improved. The canteen, medical facility, and sports and games are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Affordable but lacks practical learning and industry exposure: average infrastructure and events.

review_content.Placements: Around 40% of students are placed. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 1.8 LPA, with an average around 2.5 LPA. A few internships are offered in small firms, with roles mostly in sales, support, or trainee positions. The top recruiters are limited; overall, the placement scenario is average but consistent.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has decent Wi-Fi, average labs, and basic classrooms. The library is small but functional. Hostel rooms need maintenance, mess food is repetitive, and the sports facilities are limited. Medical help is available, but response time is slow. The hostel rooms are very small and have to be shared with 5 people, which is not good.

Among the best colleges/universities in India, Swarrnim University is a reputed and trusted university that is known to offer various streams in engineering among which one can select. Some of the popular streams in engineering are Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and many more. Students are free to select any according to their choice and preference.Moreover, the university has been ranked one of the top universities in India in the Band Promising category category in the Atal Ranking of Institutions on Innovation Achievements 2021, an initiative of the Ministry of Education, Government of India. The university has also been ranked in Top 50 institutions in India on Innovation Achievement and top 4 private universities selected from Gujrat 2020. Additionally, the institute has also been rated 3.5/4 stars in Institutions Innovation Council 3.0 (2020-2021) by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. The university has state-of-the -art infrastructure with all the modern facilities and amenities for smooth conduction of the course.

review_summary.college_name: SSIU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements and good vibes for studies.

content.Placements: It does excellent work and places students. There is a very good environment in college areas. 92% of students are eligible for placements in B.Sc. IT. Many students get good packages in their courses. Students have a great platform for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college has its own personal Wi-Fi and labs for students. Classrooms are very big and attractive for students who come from other cities and states. It has a nice school structure. The hostel, mess, and medical facilities are good. The campus has good vibes for outer students. The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has good vibes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Reasonable academics, but lacks industry focus, poor infrastructure, and limited placements.

content.Placements: As a B.Pharma student, only 10% of us got placed, with packages ranging from Rs 2 LPA - Rs 6 LPA. Local companies dominate placements and internships, with only 5% getting internship opportunities. The college needs better industry exposure and placement support.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor, with overcrowded hostels housing 5 students per room and visible wall cracks. Labs are average, though medical labs are slightly better. The library is decent. Sports activities are inactive, and medical assistance is slow to respond.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: An average college for those who want just a degree.

content.Placements: 30-40% of students were placed in my course. They market 40 LPA as the highest package, but talking to some of my seniors, there are no such packages offered. Local companies recruit; they market themselves like big companies coming for recruitment, but I haven't witnessed that.
content.Infrastructure: The situation is very poor: no proper Wi-Fi and no proper system; they still use Windows 7, with broken mice and keyboards. The library is much better, having been renovated this year. The hostel quality was very poor, but it has improved. The canteen, medical facility, and sports and games are average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA Hons) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Affordable but lacks practical learning and industry exposure: average infrastructure and events.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students are placed. The highest package was 5 LPA, the lowest was 1.8 LPA, with an average around 2.5 LPA. A few internships are offered in small firms, with roles mostly in sales, support, or trainee positions. The top recruiters are limited; overall, the placement scenario is average but consistent.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has decent Wi-Fi, average labs, and basic classrooms. The library is small but functional. Hostel rooms need maintenance, mess food is repetitive, and the sports facilities are limited. Medical help is available, but response time is slow. The hostel rooms are very small and have to be shared with 5 people, which is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and campus life, but the curriculum needs an update.

content.Placements: About 85% of students from my batch get placed, with the highest package at 18 LPA, the lowest at 3.5 LPA, and an average of 6.5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and Capgemini. Around 70% get internships in firms like Wipro and Deloitte.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers modern labs, fast Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and decent, the mess food is average, and there are good medical facilities. The campus also has sports grounds for cricket, badminton, and more.

admission_overview.college_name: SSIU Admission 2026: Dates, Courses, Eligibility, Application Form

paragraphs: SSIU provides Diploma, UG, PG and PhD courses in disciplines such as Engineering, Architecture, Design, Science, Management and Paramedical streams. These include courses such as BTech, BCA, BCom, MCA, MCom, MBA, BBA, BSc and BArch.

At SSIU, admission is done basis entrance exams. BTech admission is done basis JEE Main scores. For BArch, the University considers NATA scores. PG course admissions are granted upon students performance in centralized counselling conducted by the University. LLB admission process is done on merit basis.
Popular Courses
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Graduation/ Master's with a minimum aggregate of 50%
The application process is online. Check the eligibility as mentioned above and apply accordingly.
Specialized Entrance Tests and Criteria

UG Admissions to courses such as BDes (Graphics & Animation Design), BA (Event Management), BSc Animation & VFX, Gaming, and Catering & Hotel Management are through entrance test conducted by SSIU. BArch admissions is through valid NATA exam score. Valid NEET UG score is mandatory for BAMS and BHMS programmes. BPT admissions are done basis GUJCET scores. Admission to other UG programs is done on merit basis.
PG Courses admission for courses such as MPlan is based on GUJCET scores. Admission to other PG programs is done on merit basis.
For Additional Courses such as diploma, PG diploma and certificate programs, admission is based on merit.
BTech Admission 2026

Class 12 pass from a recognized board with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as main subjects is the eligibility.

placement_report.college_name: SSIU Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SSIU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University placements for 2024 recorded a highest domestic package of INR 84 LPA . The highest international package offered stood at INR 48 LPA . More than 400 companies took part in the placements and offered over 2600 jobs .

Earlier, the University witnessed the participation of 400 companies during 2023 placements. The average package offered during Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University placements 2023 was INR 5.18 LPA . Further, the highest domestic package and highest international package stood at INR 30 LPA and INR 48 LPA , respectively.

The Training and Placement cell at SSIU started Campus to Corporate Program (CTCP) that offers the students' overall development. The students are placed in MNC's and various industries like Service Based, Product Based, Pharmaceutical, IT, FMCG, banking, insurance, hospitality, agriculture, etc.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MBA programmes at SSIU?
faqs.answer: Approximately 1.3 Lacs is the yearly fee for the standard MBA programme. There would be a yearly tuition fee of around 1.5 Lacs for various specialisations, such as the MBA in Healthcare Management and the MBA in Family Business Management. Every year, this charge will change. If a student chooses to live on campus, there will be fees for the mess and hostel. Scholarships based on merit are provided by SSIU to exceptional applicants accepted into the MBA programme. Your academic standing and admission exam results determine how much of the scholarship you receive. For students who can prove they are financially struggling, SSIU also provides need-based scholarships.Financial statements and evidence of income are among the paperwork required when applying for a need-based scholarship.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for B.Sc in Swarnim University?
faqs.answer: Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University fees for the BSc course might range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 3 Lacs per the specialisations candidates wants to pursue. The fees might include multiple components other than the tuition fees. Students are required to pay the BSc fees once the admission lists are out. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

description: SSIU cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The SSIU cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the SSIU BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 12933 and 50370 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 12933 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.Tech. in Cyber Security and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respectively.

Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to SSIU can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and good vibes for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has its own personal Wi-Fi and labs for students. Classrooms are very big and attractive for students who come from other cities and states. It has a nice school structure. The hostel, mess, and medical facilities are good. The campus has good vibes for outer students. The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has good vibes.

reviews.review_heading: Reasonable academics, but lacks industry focus, poor infrastructure, and limited placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor, with overcrowded hostels housing 5 students per room and visible wall cracks. Labs are average, though medical labs are slightly better. The library is decent. Sports activities are inactive, and medical assistance is slow to respond.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for those who want just a degree.
reviews.review_text: The situation is very poor: no proper Wi-Fi and no proper system; they still use Windows 7, with broken mice and keyboards. The library is much better, having been renovated this year. The hostel quality was very poor, but it has improved. The canteen, medical facility, and sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable but lacks practical learning and industry exposure: average infrastructure and events.
reviews.review_text: The campus has decent Wi-Fi, average labs, and basic classrooms. The library is small but functional. Hostel rooms need maintenance, mess food is repetitive, and the sports facilities are limited. Medical help is available, but response time is slow. The hostel rooms are very small and have to be shared with 5 people, which is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and campus life, but the curriculum needs an update.
reviews.review_text: The department offers modern labs, fast Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and decent, the mess food is average, and there are good medical facilities. The campus also has sports grounds for cricket, badminton, and more.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good course curriculum and placements. It lacks practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in the college. It has fast Wi-Fi, powerful labs, the best classrooms, the best library, and the best hostel. The food quality is average. Medical facilities, sports, and games are available specially for students. The environment of my college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Only for certification.
reviews.review_text: There's no Wi-Fi, but yes, the infrastructure is good. It is equipped with a separate library for engineering & medical sides. There's a big cricket ground, football ground, tennis court, badminton court, and a proper full-fledged medical ward/hospital. For engineers, there are 2 different computer labs: Windows lab & Apple lab. A separate seminar room is also available. It's equipped with almost everything a student wishes for. And there's a good canteen too.

reviews.review_heading: College with Apple labs and incubation center for innovative ideas.
reviews.review_text: We have a Wi-Fi campus, and it's only available in labs and libraries. My college has Apple labs and computer labs. We also have an incubation center where we can give our inventions or innovative ideas. We have an incubation cell for innovative ideas, and we also get capital if our idea is good. The food is much better. We have free Wi-Fi available in the hostel. There is a Bed and a separate river for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: After all, if you are a person who is easy.
reviews.review_text: Every facility seems pretty decent and I have no complaints regarding it. Everything works perfectly fine for me in the uni premises. Hostel rooms have a total capacity of 5 people per room allotment and yes it is very good , no problem at my end.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arihant School of Pharmacy and Bio-research Institute.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all classrooms had air-conditioning. All facilities were available in labs. Both the gas line and water supply were properly installed. In our college library, all types of books were available for knowledge gain. There were various types of references available. The food served in the canteen was good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food was so good in the canteen. There was a good environment for education.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped labs, 24X7 Wi-Fi, an incubation center, and a library with more than 5000 books. There are air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned hostels with 4 and 5 sharing rooms. Our college has playgrounds for cricket, football, and a swimming pool. Apple lab is available. It has a hygienic mess, pure drinking water facilities in the hostel and college, and a cafeteria with reasonable food items.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its education system.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are good but air-conditioners are not available. We also have a library for specific B.E and B.Tech students. There is a medical campus, and doctors are also available. There is a hospital that provides free medicines and services. Sports activities are also conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is best for the B. Pharmacy study.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is very good. It provides a clean class, laboratories, and libraries are also very useful and all books and references are available. In our college canteens is very good, and the food quality is excellent. The medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with faculty members and college authorities.
reviews.review_text: All labs have medium-level facilities. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are good and huge with some good facilities. The library is awesome. I have no idea about hostel facilities. The quality of food served is the best in the canteen area. Medical facilities are good 24 hours. The sports area is separate, and all types of games are available.

paragraphs: Approximately 1.3 Lacs is the yearly fee for the standard MBA programme. There would be a yearly tuition fee of around 1.5 Lacs for various specialisations, such as the MBA in Healthcare Management and the MBA in Family Business Management. Every year, this charge will change. If a student chooses to live on campus, there will be fees for the mess and hostel.

Scholarships based on merit are provided by SSIU to exceptional applicants accepted into the MBA programme. Your academic standing and admission exam results determine how much of the scholarship you receive. For students who can prove they are financially struggling, SSIU also provides need-based scholarships.Financial statements and evidence of income are among the paperwork required when applying for a need-based scholarship.

The University offers financial assistance to economically weak students. SSIU has a “Swarrnim Eay Fee” system, where the University provides education loan at 0% interest rate. The loan will be provided without any processing charge and 100% free insurance cover funding.

Swarrnim Startup and Innovation University fees for the BSc course might range from INR 1 Lacs to INR 3 Lacs per the specialisations candidates wants to pursue. The fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.answer: A:    NID Kurukshetra accepts scores of the NID Design Aptitude Test (DAT) for admission to its B.Des program. The merit list is prepared based on various factors, including NID DAT entrance examination scores, portfolio evaluation, and interview. Candidates should have passing marks in 10+2 as per the NID Haryana course eligibility criteria. For NID Haryana admission, candidates first have to clear DAT Prelims. After that, shortlisted candidates have to clear DAT Mains. A final merit list is released considering the scores of both the entrance tests

However note that the application fees for overseas candidates seeking admission to supernumerary seats is INR 5000. In case of the M.Des programme, the application fees for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates applying for one discipline is INR 3,000. If two disciplines are chosen, the application fee is INR 6000. Meanwhile, SC, ST, PwD candidate need to pay INR 1,500 for one discipline, and INR 3000 for two disciplines.The NID DAT 2026 application form is now open.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: NID Haryana is the second-best NID after Ahmedabad.

review_content.Placements: 99% of students get placed in either through campus placements or self. The highest package offered last time in the textile department was 75 LPA. The average package is 12 LPA. A lot of companies approach including Daily Objects, Adobe, Microsoft, etc. A lot of students got internships during graduation projects. Creative director or creative head are the top roles offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a well-maintained hostel with decent means. Wi-Fi is good but can be better. It has decent studios and a library. It has very good facilities like AC, TV, and digital library. We have our own ambulance in case of emergency and a doctor is present on the campus. Mess is open till 1 am.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good in everything, literally the best of NIDs. Majority of students are satisfied.

review_content.Placements: Since I am in the first year, I don't have a proper idea about the placements. But one thing I am sure is that our placement cell is providing placements to many companies all over India, as per the college's brochure. I have personally heard from some seniors that they also got many internship offers, thanks to the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really great and beautiful. Unlike other NIDs, this college's aesthetics is more like IIT. And talking about facilities, we have pretty much all the basic facilities both in college and hostel. The college has great high-end facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, good and secure Wi-Fi, labs with high-end computers and devices, and the workshop is also having everything we needed, such as metal workshop, wood, clay, laser cutting, and 3D printing workshops. And about hostels, we have high-end Wi-Fi, spacious rooms, and automatic washing machines. The mess food is the greatest food you will ever find in any college. Totally worth it.

admission_overview.college_name: NID Haryana Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: NID Haryana or NIT Kurukshetra admissionsare entrance-based. The institute offers admission to BDes programme via Design Aptitude Test (DAT) scores, which includes Prelims and Mains. The course is available in three specialisations and the admission process is common for all programmes. Candidates can apply on the official portal of NID for admission toNID Haryana. The admission process for NID through DAT has been started for the year 2025. Candidates can check out the following video for information regarding theNID admission process:
More details aroundNID Haryana admissions 2025are as follows:

Candidates seeking for admission to NID Haryana must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements before filling out the admission form. The institute conducts a national-level entrance exam for admission to UG programme. Check below theNID Haryana coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
NID DATPrelims + DAT Mains

NID Kuruskhetra fees include multiple components such as tuition fee, hostel charges, one-time security deposit and more. Moreover, NIT Haryana has three specialisations under BDes programme. The seat intake for each of them is 25. Tabulated below are the NID Haryana BDes total tuition fee and seat intake:

NID Haryana admission process is consists of mutiple rounds. It includes filling online application form, qualifying entrance exam and final seat allotment after the result declaration. The detailed steps of admission for NID Kurkshetra are as follows:
STEP 1: NID Gandhinagar Application Process 2025

To apply for admission at NID Haryana, candidates need to apply on the official website of NID. The design institute applications are conudcted in online mode. The application form must be filled carefully with all the relevant details. Along with that, candidates must also pay an application fee.
STEP 2: Entrance Exam

NIT Kurukshetra admissions are completely entrance-based for BDes programme. To get admission, candidates need to qualify for NIT DAT entrance exam. It is a national-level examination, which is conducted across 22 cities in India. Candidates should solveNIT DAT question papersto practice before the exam.
STEP 3: Declaration of Result

After the completion of the entrance exam, the conducting body releases the final result. Later on, a cutoff list is released by the institute mentioning the qualfying score for admission to BDes course at NID Haryana.
STEP 4: Release of Provisional Offer Letter
Candidates who make through the selection process and qualify and meet the cutoff marks are then issued provisional offer letters.
STEP 5: Final Seat Allotment & Fee Payment
Further, the institute conducts seat allotment rounds for selected students. Moreover, candidates must pay the course fee and report to the respective campus for physical verification of documents.
Check out more on National Institute of Design, Haryana in the video below:

The table below shows a comparative analysis of the rank and scores of the last candidate admitted on the basis of NID DAT cutoffs for Open category for the last year for top NIDs, including the NID Haryana:BDes Cutoff 2023: Top NIDs Comparison - Rank and ScoreNIDs(Open) Rank 2023ScoreNID Haryana18161.60NID Ahmedabad4765.80NID Andhra Pradesh15462.20NID Assam25560.30N

faqs.question: Does NID Kurukshetra accept NID Entrance Exam score?
faqs.answer: Yes, NID Kurukshetra accepts the NID Entrance Exam score for admission. The cutoff score for NID Haryana is around 175 for the Open category, and the cutoff percentile for the B.Des course was 61.6 in the last round. The NID DAT cutoff marks are released by the National Institute of Design and include the minimum score that candidates need to obtain in the prelims and Mains exams. The final merit list for NID admission is prepared by considering the weighted scores obtained by the candidates in both prelims and Mains exams, with the weightage given to prelims and Mains being 30% and 70%, respectively for BDes programme.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does NID Kurukshetra accept for admission to B.Des.?
faqs.answer: For admission to the B.Des programme at NID Kurukshetra, candidates must first clear the NID DAT Prelims and then appear for the DAT Mains exam if they are shortlisted. The expected cutoff for the Open rankings in NID Haryana is around 181, with a cutoff score of 61.6. The Open rank for B.Des at NID Kurukshetra for the NID DAT 2024 has been wrapped up with a cutoff score of 175. The NID DAT entrance exam consists of two sub-exams:DAT PrelimsDAT MainsThe final merit list for NID DAT is prepared by giving weightage to both the DAT Prelims and DAT Mains scores. Candidates who do not appear for the DAT Mains will not be considered for admission. For the B.Des program, the minimum eligibility criteria are passing marks in Class 12.

reviews.review_heading: NID Haryana is the second-best NID after Ahmedabad.
reviews.review_text: It has a well-maintained hostel with decent means. Wi-Fi is good but can be better. It has decent studios and a library. It has very good facilities like AC, TV, and digital library. We have our own ambulance in case of emergency and a doctor is present on the campus. Mess is open till 1 am.

reviews.review_heading: Good in everything, literally the best of NIDs. Majority of students are satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really great and beautiful. Unlike other NIDs, this college's aesthetics is more like IIT. And talking about facilities, we have pretty much all the basic facilities both in college and hostel. The college has great high-end facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, good and secure Wi-Fi, labs with high-end computers and devices, and the workshop is also having everything we needed, such as metal workshop, wood, clay, laser cutting, and 3D printing workshops. And about ho...

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college has helpful and good faculty members, placements are average, and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 2-3% of students got placed in a company. The package is approximately 3 - 5 LPA. There are no fixed companies for placements. Many companies come as per their requirements. The top role offered in our course is in development and some DSA knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. There is another building offered for our department no other one can enter in our department from another department. The lab conditions are good. Many systems are available in our lab to practice our problem and improve our coding skills. The classroom facilities are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good, but can be better. More & more involvement from the media industry should be brought to table.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for my course in our college because the batch size is very small and very few people show interest in our courses. The internships are not provided from the college side, but we can do internships at the places we want with the letter approved by our HOD.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. We have access to our studios and libraries, and the editing rooms are available for us. The students are allowed to use the digital equipment available in college, and we are allowed to cover events and do photography and videography.

review_summary.college_name: IES University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has a big campus but an average faculty. No placements in Agriculture, and limited student life.

content.Placements: For B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture at IES University, there are no direct placements from this department. Most placements happen for engineering and management students, where companies visit the campus. In Agriculture, students usually prepare for government exams like ICAR or banking jobs, or go for higher studies. Some students also look for private sector jobs on their own in agri-based companies. Internships are very limited and mostly arranged by students themselves through personal contacts. If students choose this course, they should not depend on campus placements but focus on their own career options after graduation.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty and placement. To be honest our college is the best.

content.Placements: 50% of students placed last year. There are many companies on campus, and approximately 60-70% of students get internships from the college most of the students are placed by the internship, and even internship which is provided by the college is also paid.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel life is much better than I had imagined. Classrooms and library are also good and peaceful even the sports faculty and facilities are provided by the college on the next level. Every month sports events are organized by the university and other teams.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has helpful and good faculty members, placements are average, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 2-3% of students got placed in a company. The package is approximately 3 - 5 LPA. There are no fixed companies for placements. Many companies come as per their requirements. The top role offered in our course is in development and some DSA knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. There is another building offered for our department no other one can enter in our department from another department. The lab conditions are good. Many systems are available in our lab to practice our problem and improve our coding skills. The classroom facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good, but can be better. More & more involvement from the media industry should be brought to table.

The internships are not provided from the college side, but we can do internships at the places we want with the letter approved by our HOD.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. We have access to our studios and libraries, and the editing rooms are available for us. The students are allowed to use the digital equipment available in college, and we are allowed to cover events and do photography and videography.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good or bad things about the college, but this is actually a good college & you can enjoy your life.

content.Placements: This college unnecessarily increases the fees and harasses students by the college management and workers. Approximately 10% of students are placed in companies by the college campus. 50% of students are interested in the college campus. Then the rest of the students collect their degree and go back home.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. The quality of labs is low. My classroom in college is good, like average. The college library is excellent. It has a quiet and relaxing feel for studying. The hostel is not good. I stayed in the college hostel for only one year. The environment is fully green. The facilities for sports and games are crowded.

admission_overview.college_name: IES University Admisssion 2025: CUET, Process, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: The IES University Admission 2025is open now. They collectively offer undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in the fields of Engineering, Commerce, Humanities, Management and Sciences. The university also offers PhD courses. Admission to all the UG and PG courses atIES Universityis merit-based. Students seeking admission to IES University must apply through its official website.

The university offers more than 20 full-time courses. The mode of application to apply for any of the offered programmes is both online and offline. Below are the key highlights forIES University admissions:
Particulars
IES University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

IES University coursesoffer UG, PG, and various other courses to students. These courses are provided across Commerce, Management, Science, and various other streams.IES University course admissionsare merit-based/entrance-based. Candidates must fill out the form as the applications are currently open. Find below the Eligibility and selection criteria for the variousIES University courses:
Graduation with 50%
Class 12 with 45%
IES University admission process includes registration, selection and fee payment. Below are the steps to get a seat in IES University:
STEP 1: IES University Application Process 2025

Candidates must download the application form from the official website of IES University. Besides, candidates can also apply online. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to apply for a course. Candidates will also need to submit the specified documents during the application process.
STEP 2: Selection
IES University shortlists candidates for admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The college evaluates the application form of the candidates for their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Once selected, candidates must pay theIES University course feeto confirm their seat in the college.

courses_data.description: IES University provides a BTech course in different branches of engineering with a practical learning and industry-oriented approach. Admission is based on merit, with a minimum of 45% marks in Class 12. The course imparts technical and problem-solving skills needed in engineering professions.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at IES University?
faqs.answer: To seek admission to BTech in IES University, students should have passed Class 12 with 45% marks. Merit and counselling are the selection criteria. Students interested in applying need to apply through the official site of the university.

faqs.question: What specialisations are offered in BTech at IES University?
faqs.answer: IES University provides BTech courses in major areas of engineering like Computer Science, Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering. The courses provide hands-on laboratory training and industry-oriented training. These specializations equip students for technical positions in various industries.

courses_data.name: IES University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IES University offers a full-time MBA programme with the goal of creating managerial and leadership skills. The program is merit-based and requires candidates to have at least a graduation degree with 50% marks. The MBA program includes modern business education through experiential learning, industry interface, and career guidance.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at IES University?
faqs.answer: For eligibility at IES University's MBA, candidates should have a graduation degree with a minimum 50% of marks. Admission is strictly merit-based, and counselling is done afterwards. No entrance exam for admission to IES University's MBA course is necessary.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for MBA admission at IES University?
faqs.answer: IES University does not hold any individual entrance exam for admissions to MBA. There is a process of selection based on academic achievements and success in the counselling round. Candidates need to apply through the official website of the university for initiating the process.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA from IES University?
faqs.answer: An MBA from IES University provides career opportunities in finance, marketing, HR, and operations. The course has practical exposure and soft skill development. Placement assistance is also provided by IES University to enable students to get suitable job positions.

placement_report.college_name: IES University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: IES University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: IES University has a placement cell that ensures placement assistance to every student. The institute invites companies from different sectors to conduct the placement process at the Campus premises. The placement cell is also responsible for conducting on-campus placement drives and organises a wide range of activities such as industry visits, live projects, workshops, mock interviews, and specialized training sessions.

IES University concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the highest package offered during IES University placements in 2024 stood at INR 21 LPA . Further, over 250 recruiters participated in 2024 placements and offered handsome packages to the students of the 2024 batch. More than 50 recruiters offered the package of INR 5 LPA and above. Additionally, the highest stipend offered during the recent internship placements stood at INR 5 Lakh per month. The top recruiters of IES University in 2024 included Muthoot Finance, Genpact, Hitachi, Amazon, Glenmark, Cipla, India Today, TCS, ITC Infotech, etc.
Note : The placement year is not mentioned on the official website. Hence, the placement data mentioned above is assumed for the year 2024 .

reviews.review_heading: It has a big campus but an average faculty. No placements in Agriculture, and limited student life.
reviews.review_text: I am studying B.Sc.(Hons.) in Agriculture at IES University, Bhopal. The infrastructure for our course is decent. Classrooms are spacious with projectors, and the seating is comfortable enough. The library is big with a fair collection of books and journals, though agriculture-specific material could be improved. Wi-Fi is available across the campus, but sometimes, the speed is slow. Labs and experiential farms are provided for agriculture students, which help in practical learning. However, the...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and placement. To be honest our college is the best.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life is much better than I had imagined. Classrooms and library are also good and peaceful even the sports faculty and facilities are provided by the college on the next level. Every month sports events are organized by the university and other teams.

reviews.review_heading: The college has helpful and good faculty members, placements are average, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. There is another building offered for our department no other one can enter in our department from another department. The lab conditions are good. Many systems are available in our lab to practice our problem and improve our coding skills. The classroom facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good, but can be better. More & more involvement from the media industry should be brought to table.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good. We have access to our studios and libraries, and the editing rooms are available for us. The students are allowed to use the digital equipment available in college, and we are allowed to cover events and do photography and videography.

reviews.review_heading: Good or bad things about the college, but this is actually a good college & you can enjoy your life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. The quality of labs is low. My classroom in college is good, like average. The college library is excellent. It has a quiet and relaxing feel for studying. The hostel is not good. I stayed in the college hostel for only one year. The environment is fully green. The facilities for sports and games are crowded.

reviews.review_heading: If you have talent then you should be away from this college otherwise most welcome .
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are available. The facilities provided in the hostel are good; they provide a bed, study table, and locker, but the quality of food in the mess is the worst. In my opinion, consider a paying guest accommodation. Canteen and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college; the admission and office work are very bad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good; there are many facilities available in our university such as a library, all labs, and some smart classes, but not all classes are smart. The hostel facilities are good; they are well-maintained and always neat and clean. The mess in the university is not good because the food is not well-prepared for students.

reviews.review_heading: In IES university, there is a very big issue with the fee structure.
reviews.review_text: Faculty is very good in the civil engineering department. Infrastructure like the classroom is average, the library and labs are quite good, and wi-fi is not available for students. Mobile phones are restricted on college campuses. Drinking water is not drinkable and not available 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: It’s my humble request to students not to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good; classrooms are average, but no labs or library services are provided to students. Canteen food is good. Medical facilities are also available to the students, but no sports or games are available to the students. Games are only allowed if one takes part in any tournament.

reviews.review_heading: This is an honest review of the B.Sc. B.Ed. dual degree program from a girl's perspective.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good, all equipped as smart classes with projectors, smart boards, and traditional chalkboards. LAN Wi-Fi is available in all departments throughout the college. The Wi-Fi speed is slightly low but sufficient for studying from YouTube. The library and labs are not up to par. The library is small and sometimes runs out of stock of curriculum books. Hostels are quite good with all amenities available at an affordable rate; there are three hostels in total, two for boys and one ...

reviews.review_heading: Integrated B.Sc. and B.Ed. Dual Degree Course Review.
reviews.review_text: All the labs are well-furnished and equipped with the latest equipment. The Computer Science department lab is the best lab on campus. It has been made in collaboration with TCS ION Digital. It is said to be one of the best labs among Bhopal city's colleges. The library is decent, with only curriculum books present there. Seating places for those who want to sit and study are also available, but the library is not big enough to handle all the crowd. Classrooms are new with modern furniture; ther...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college that provides good placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our department are good. All the facilities are provided in our course such as free internet for studying, a library, classrooms, labs, and very good quality hostels. It has a ground to play games.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IES University.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has more than 5 buildings, 2 canteens, 2 libraries, many computer labs, mechanical lab, civil lab, accounting sector, etc. Our college provides specific branches like pharmacy, diploma, hotel management, B.Tech in engineering, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has friendly teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. A library is available. Sports facilities are available. Living spaces are clean. Wi-Fi is available. The hostel is clean. A canteen is available. It is an excellent campus in Bhopal. Hostel facilities are excellent. All classrooms are equipped with smart boards, which makes learning more interactive and engaging. They are essential for conducting experiments and practical work.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering students but not for management and other fields.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is excellent. We have clean classrooms and labs as well as libraries. Canteen food is also healthy and it gives many varieties of fast food. They have two basketball courts, a football ground on the campus, separate department buildings, etc.

data.description: IES University campus offers several facilities to the students and caters to all their needs. The institute has state-of-the-art infrastructure which includes designed classrooms, cafeteria, auditorium, etc. The classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with digitalized technology to facilitate comprehensive learning. The college campus is surrounded by greenery all around and provides a safe and creative environment for students to enhance their skills. Apart from this, IES University Bhopal offers transportation facilities to students and faculty members to free them from the mental tension of travelling. The campus has several facilities available for students such as a common canteen, playground, conference rooms, etc.

admission_process.title: Saintgits College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Saintgits College of Engineering admission is open for all courses. Admission to UG and PG courses is entrance-based.Saintgits College of Engineeringoffers BTech and MTech at UG and PG levels respectively. The college accepts entrance exams including KEAM and GATE for admission to BTech and MTech courses. All these courses are offered under the affiliation ofAPJ Abdul Kalam Technological University. Interested applicants can apply by visiting the official website of Saintgits Group of Institutions. Read the below article to know more about Saintgits College of Engineering admission process, along with course eligibility and selection criteria:

Saintgits College of Engineering course admission 2025is entrance/merit-based. The college offers more than 10 courses in various teams such as Accounting & Commerce, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Design etc. Check out the following table for details aroundSaintgits College of Engineering course admissions 2025:

2.Applicants for management quota programs are required to participate in a common counselling process after the release of Class 12 results.

Saintgits College of Engineering admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG and PG, courses, including BTech and MTech. Saintgits College of Engineering offers one undergraduate course, including BTech. The duration of the courses is four years. The college also offers MTech at the postgraduate level with a duration of two years. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college accepts KEAM exam scores for admission to BTech and GATE exam scores for admission to MTech.

Further, the college also offers admission based on Management quota in both BTech and MTech. The college offers admission to candidates belonging to the Management quota based on the last qualifying exam score followed by merit-based counselling. Want to know other admission-related details about Saintgits College of Engineering course eligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Course Name
Eligibility

Saintgits College of Engineering admission process is open for undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The admission is entrance-based, followed by a counselling round. Applicants must complete the admission process for admission. Check below the Saintgits College of Engineering admission process 2025:
STEP 1: Saintgits College of Engineering Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at SCE ranges between INR 250 and INR 400. Students can also check the detailedSaintgits College of Engineering feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Saintgits College of Engineering selects applicants for BTech and MTech based on entrance exams along with counselling such as KEAM and GATE entrance exams.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the college releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

placement_report.college_name: Saintgits College of Engineering, Kottayam Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Saintgits College of Engineering Placement Overview
paragraphs: According to Engineering NIRF report 2024 released by Saintgits College of Engineering, the median package offered during BTech and MTech placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 5 LPA, respectively. Further, as per the Management NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during Saintgits College of Engineering MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 7.40 LPA. I n addition, the College has released the 2023 placement statistics. As per the official website, a total of 224 offers were made and a total of 25 companies were recruited during Saintgits College of Engineering placements 2023. The top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering in placements 2023 were TCS, Quest Global, Experion, Federal Bank, Acabes International , etc.

As per the NIRF report 2023, 216 BTech and 33 MTech students were placed during Saintgits College of Engineering placements 2022. The median package offered to BTech and MTech students during Saintgits College of Engineering placements 2022 stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: Can KPMG and Black Rock be considered as some of the top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes KPMG and Black Rock can be considered as some of the top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering as they have recentky visted the campus for providing olacement opportunities to the students pursuing different courses in the college. They are among the top recruitors which visit the company among many others like TCS and infosys etc. They provide the highest package offered to the students at the university and recruit the students from the university every year.

faqs.question: Does Saintgits College of Engineering offer better placements than MIT-WPU?
faqs.answer: No, Saintgits college of engineering do not have better placements than MIT-WPU. The placement rates and placement packages are better at MIT. According to 2023 data the highest package offered at Saintgits college of engineering was around 10LPA and average was around 4LPA. While in MIT, the highest package offered was around 50 LPA and the average package offered was 7.5LPA. The differences can be clearly seen and by seeing the above figures it can be justified that MIT-WPU is better than Saintgits college of engineering in terms of placements.

faqs.question: Does Saintgits College of Engineering have good placements?
faqs.answer: According to the data provided by the college, Saintgits College of Engineering has good placements. The college has a specialised placement cell that employs modern methodologies to deliver talent that satisfies the requirements of the most demanding national and international recruiters.The college has a wide alumni network working across multiple sectors. The highest salary package offered during the 2023 placement drive was 6 LPA, and the median package offered to BTech and M.Tech students during the 2022 placement drive stood at INR 3.5 LPA and INR 4 LPA, respectively.The top recruiters of Saintgits College of Engineering in the 2023 placement drive were TCS, Quest Global, Experion, Federal Bank, Acabes International, etc.The college saw its students getting placed with higher salary packages in globally reputed companies like IBM, PWC, EY, TCS, Infosys, etc. in 2022

faqs.question: How are B Tech placements at Saintgits College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The college offers excellent placement opportunities to the students pursuing B.Tech at their college. In 2022, global giants like IBM, PWC, EY, TCS, Infosys etc. recruited the students of the college. This year, the average salary has also increased by 34%. The total number of offers stands at 555 and our students graduating in 2022 have had the opportunity to participate in recruitment drives from 93 companies till date. The average salary of students who have received a B.Tech degree is INR 3.5 Lacs per annum.

faqs.question: Are pursuing UG courses at Saintgits College of Engineering expensive?
faqs.answer: No, pursuing UG courses at Saintgits college of engineering is not expensive. The fee structure of the Institute is reasonable and affordable. The fee for course like BTech is around 3lacs.There are many colleges which charge more than this and are also not value for money also. The Institute provides a good return on the fees invested and your fees will not be wasted in this Institute. The college also provides various scholarship and loan facilities to the meritorious students so that they can get some relief from the fees.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering cost?
faqs.answer: MBA at Saintgits college of engineering costs around 4.2 lakhs. The fees can also be paid in installments. There are 4 semester wise installments by which the students will be able to pay the fee easily. The fees is moderately expensive. The meritorious students get various scholarship facilities and loan facilities so that they can get some relief from the fees. The fees may little bit vary according to the specialisation the student is choosing.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering cost?
faqs.answer: The Total tuition fees for MBA at Saintgits College of Engineering is Rs 4.20 Lakh. Whereas, hostel fees is about Rs 1.76 Lacs per annum. In this, the meal plan is also included. MBA is a two year course so if we count the total cost then it would be - 4.20 Lacs + ( 1.76 Lacs × 2 ) = Rs 7.72 lakhs.

faqs.question: Do students get their ROI after completing MBA from Saintgits College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, students get a decent return on thier fees which they have invested in doing MBA from Saintgits college of engineering. The fees for the MBA programme at this university is around 2.7lacs for full course. The highest package offered for MBA was around 7.5 LPA, while 4 LPA was the average package which was offered. According to the resonable fees structure, the packages offered are decent. The ROI depends on the student also. If the student works good on his skills he/she may definitely get a good ROI.
