reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for MBA Course.
reviews.review_text: The department's infrastructure is excellent, with well-equipped laboratories, Wi-Fi access, and smart classrooms. The hostels are likewise in decent condition and serve good, simple food. The college has six canteens, which are open until 10 p.m. There are also doctors available. Hostels offer gyms, Wi-Fi, and sports including basketball, soccer, volleyball, cricket, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Saintgits College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Looking for proper guidance in the placement process and when companies arrived, orientations were planned. They explained about the company and other necessities. But students were asked to attend the drives based on the semester scores. Most of the banking sectors and few of the HR based companies offered moderate packages ranging between 3 to 4 CTC.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for an MBA.
reviews.review_text: The amenities for the MBA programme are outstanding. Classrooms are properly outfitted, and laboratories operate with current software. The library is vast, offering excellent study areas. Hostels are acceptable, providing essential facilities, whereas the food standard in the mess is mediocre. Healthcare facilities are available, and there are excellent recreational sports opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: It has a great placement record with humble teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is very clean and has high-quality equipment. Each of our classrooms is quite large and air-conditioned. There is a large library for helping the students with their studies, where there are various journals and magazines from home and abroad. There is also a cafeteria for students in their free time. There is a large field for sports along with studies. Hostels are well-equipped with special facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to learn some damaged and great things.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of free high-speed Wi-Fi network, specific libraries for department special text, and a single integrated library which consists of both physical and book sections and is inclusive of a networking library. Classrooms are well-equipped with display systems. College hostel is within walking distance of the campus and provides quality facilities with a nearby hospital, college ground, prepared food, etc.

reviews.review_heading: We have strong robotics exposure, decent placements, and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs for mechatronics, control systems, microcontrollers, and industrial automation. The department supports minor and major projects. Hostel facilities are good. Discipline is maintained. Mess is good. The food is good but not that great. The hostel and college have Wi-Fi availability.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The campus has well infrastructure, with average classrooms with projectors. There is a central library with specific departmental libraries. The campus also has three canteens and sports grounds for football, cricket, volleyball, and basketball. The hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls, with the girls’ hostel inside the premises of the college campus. The food and accommodation are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, high-tech labs, a common library with separate departmental libraries, three canteens, well-conditioned classrooms, and washrooms for both teachers and staff. The hostel, food, and accommodation for both boys and girls separately, along with good-conditioned rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. Teachers were very helpful to academics.
reviews.review_text: There are well-maintained labs and facilities. The hostel is very good and the food is also good and also there are sports activities. The infrastructure and facilities are good. There are many good libraries, labs, classrooms, gardens, a canteen, and good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is good. All are friendly. I'm satisfied with college life, academics, and friends.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of Saintgits is fabulous. College has Wi-Fi for all the blocks and each department has its library, we do have one main big library in which we can take books for reference. The food available in the canteen is affordable and good for the price they are serving it. College has 3 main areas for having snacks/ food, each of these has soft drinks and coffee outlets. The college has a medical room. Sports and games are there, but you can access them after the regular classes so if...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and smart classrooms are there. Washrooms are clean and tidy. Hostel facilities are also nice and food is also good. Hostel rooms and bathrooms are also neat. There are total 3 canteens in the college, and the food is also good for the price. This college supports a lot of sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: An ordinary review of an ordinary student.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good hostel facilities. There are multiple hostels based on which department you are studying in. They provide good bathroom facilities. They also provide great food. They allow students to go out on weekends and so on. It's a great experience.

reviews.review_heading: That's all about my college. Well, a bit strict, but a lot of opportunities to grow.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure just stands out. The amphitheater is for programs, the auditorium for other events, even TEDx events are held at our college, and the library is really helpful. Every department has its own library and also a common library where all students study during the exams.

reviews.review_heading: Top-notch facilities and an environment that helps you achieve personal and professional growth.
reviews.review_text: The university is good and has the best infrastructure. Classrooms and campus are kept clean. There is Wi-Fi and well-equipped laboratory facilities on campus. The classrooms are smart. There is a library at our university. The food in the kitchen is good, the food in the canteen is good, and the accommodation has good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Exceptional education is provided by supportive and experienced staff and professors.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very helpful. Excellent food and services are provided at our college. Our college organizes classrooms with intellectual resources. New research tools are available. It provides 24/7 Wi-Fi connectivity. It has a spacious, well-appointed, and clean guest room. It has a great stage. All sports equipment is available. It has a gym with all the equipment.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Saintgits College of Engineering

likes.text: Top recruiting companies of our college are Amazon, IBM, VMware, Infosys, UST and Cognizant.
The college has a placement cell that helps students to excel in their interviews and placement sessions, which is also very helpful.

likes.text: I have chosen this course because it gives out a lot of job opportunities, and also it has a major role in all other engineering issues and fields.

Business: BCA specialisations in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, and BCom specialisations in Sales & Marketing, Cost & Management Accounting, and Auditing & Control.
Humanities: BA specialisations in English and Film Studies.
Health and Allied Sciences: Nutrition and Dietetics programme with specialisations in Diet Planning, Food Technology, and Fitness Management.
Management: Soft-skills training modules to help students develop skills for aptitude tests, group discussions, and interviews.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Tech at Geeta University?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee for the B.Tech programme at Geeta University varies depending on the specialization and duration of the course. For example, the B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering (CSE) has a semester fee of Rs 79,000. Additionally, the B.Tech programme at Geeta University ranges from approximately INR 1.5 L to INR 1.7 L yearly, as per different sources.

review_summary.college_name: Geeta University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best law college in Delhi NCR.

content.Placements: Students got placement in around 90 percent. All students are satisfied with the course placement. The highest package is 40 LPA but the average is 6 LPA. Internship rate is impressive, and 99 percent are from college. The roles of Lawyers are in a top position. Almost everyone got a placement and an internship opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: Moot courts for practice and experts are invited from outside for the real-world experiences. All necessary facilities are available at the campus only, so we do not need to go outside for small item purchases. Library access is 16 hours a day. We have in house ambulance, our Nescafé and café 14 is the best café we have in-house.

individual_reviews.course: BBA. LLB - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Geeta Institute of Law, Geeta University.

content.Placements: Almost all eligible students are in good places today. GIL assist well in placements. The highest package here is 36 LPA. Companies like Accenture are ones where students are placed. All eligible students got an opportunity for placements. It is good overall.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is good, airy, and it is also clean and green, located in a good place with nice surroundings. All labs and the library are well-equipped. Classrooms have smart boards. Food is good here at the mess. Food cafes are also good here. The hostel is fine here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Fine college and placements.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is fine. Some students get placed in sales and some get placed in product-based companies. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are mostly TCS, Pronell, Prodesk, Agrosoft, and many more. Top roles offered are front-end developer and back-end developer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is fine sometimes it works, sometimes it does not. The labs are also fine. Classrooms have AC in them, and they are spacious. The library is filled with books but its small. Hostel is fine as I heard from the hostellers as I am a day scholar. The food in mess and canteen is fine.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning in collaboration with Samatrix.io - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good experience at Geeta University!

content.Placements: Placements are good here at Geeta University. Almost all eligible students get placed. The highest package of GU is 40 LPA, with an average package of Rs. 6,00,000. They provide internships from the 2nd year itself. As I am doing BCA AIML, which has a good scope.
content.Infrastructure: As a BCA AIML student, I can say that the course & curriculum are good here & it is running with advanced technologies. They have Geeta Technical Hub, which not only provides hands-on experience but also makes us industry-ready as they are associated with companies like AWS, CISCO, REDHAT, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.

content.Placements: The number of placements was decent in my course. At least 80–90 percent got placements, and others opted for higher studies or went abroad to pursue their career in higher studies. Top recruiting companies that came to the campus included Wipro, TCS, HTL Ltd., and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

admission_overview.college_name: Geeta University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Geeta University admissionis open for various programmes. The university offers a wide range of programmes in the fields ofEngineering, Management, Commerce, and Pharmacyamong others such asBTech, BCom, MTech, etc.Geeta Universityaccepts applicants who satisfy the preset admission criteria of the desired programme. Students are selected based on several parameters including their past academic performance, entrance exam scores (if applicable), and more. Candidates willing to apply forGeeta University admission 2025are required to apply online by visiting the university's official website. If you want to know more about theGeeta University admission process 2025read the following article.

Geeta University course admissionis subject to the specific admission criteria set by the university. The university offers over 70 programmes in various fields. The university offers anonline mode of application. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visiting the university's official website. Interested students can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popularGeeta University courses:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 10 and Class with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the following subjects Chemistry / Biotechnology / Computer Science / Biology with minimum 45% marks
Merit/ Entrance-Based
BTech in relevant stream with minimum 50% marks
Merit/ Entrance-Based
Class 10 and Class 12 science stream with English, Physics, Chemistry & Math/Biology subjects and with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks
Merit-Based
Class 12 in Science Stream with minimum 45% marks
Merit-Based
Graduation with at least 50% marks
Merit/ Entrance-Based

Geeta University admissionprocessincludes filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds. Students looking to get into the university need to ensure that they satisfy the preset admission criteria of the desired programme before applying. Eligible students can refer to the following steps to complete the admission process of the university:
Step1: Geeta UniversityApplication Process
Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for all the courses, candidates need to fill out theapplication form online.
Step 2: Geeta University Selection Round

Geeta University selects candidates for some UG and diploma courses based on the last qualifying exam. Additionally, the university may take into consideration students' performance in the relevant entrance tests, such as CLAT/ JEE/ GATE/ MAT, etc. If required, students may have to appear for a personal interview conducted by the university.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the seat booking amount within the given deadline.

courses_data.description: Geeta University BSc admissionis entirely merit-based. The applicants who search for admission to BSc must passClass 10 and Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biologyascompulsory subjectsand a minimum of45% aggregate to be eligible to apply for the course. For more details aboutGeeta University BSc admission2025, go through the following section:

faqs.question: What are the BSc courses offered at Geeta University?
faqs.answer: Geeta University offers several full-time BSc programmes across various specialisations. Students seeking to enrol into any of the offered specialisation need to fulfil the preset admission criteria of the same. Some of the popular BSc specialisations are Nursing, Agriculture, Forensic Science, and more. Interested students can visit the official website to apply for the desired BSc course.

faqs.question: Who can apply for BSc at Geeta University?
faqs.answer: Geeta University BSc eligibilityrequires students to complete Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board and relevant subjects. The university admits students on a merit basis for the BSc programme. Students must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects in addition to having course-specific additional subjects, such as Biology, Home Science, Mathematics, etc. Those who satisfy the eligibility may apply online at the official website of the university.

To be eligible for admission candidate must haveClass 10 and Class 12withPhysics and Mathematics as compulsory subjectsalong with one of the following subjects Chemistry / Biotechnology / Computer Science / Biology with a minimum of45% marks. After filling out the basic eligibility criteria candidates need to apply online by visiting the official website of the university. For more information related to Geeta UniversityBTechadmission check the below section:

faqs.question: What all BTech courses does Geeta University offer?
faqs.answer: Geeta University offers several BTech specialisations. The admission criteria is same across all of the offered specialisations, hence, students must fulfil the criteria to get into the university. Find below the list of some of the BTech courses offered at the university:Computer Scinece & EngineeringCSE (Cyber Security)CSE (Data Science & Business Analytics)CSE (FSWD)

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Geeta University in BTech?
faqs.answer: To get admission to Geeta University in BTech course, candidates must have passed Class 10 and Class with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the following subjects Chemistry / Biotechnology / Computer Science / Biology with minimum 45% marks. Also candidates need to apply online for admission.

courses_data.name: Geeta University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Geeta University MBA admissionis open. The University offers a two-year course divided into four semesters. Candidates who have passedGraduation with at least 50% markscan apply for the MBA course. The University offers various specialisations in MBA such asFinance, Marketing, Hospitality,and many more. Check to know more aboutGeeta University MBA admission 2025:

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Geeta University?
faqs.answer: The university offers two-year MBA course at the PG level. The admission to MBA is merit-based. Candidates need to meet the eligibility requirements for getting admission. The eligibility requirement is to pass graduation with minimum of 50% aggregate in any stream to apply for MBA course.

faqs.question: Is Geeta University costly?
faqs.answer: Geeta University has affordable fee structure. The fee ranges between INR 1.04 lakh- INR 8.75 lakh. The university offers UG, PG, and Diploma courses across Engineering, Management, Commerce, Pharmacy, Computer Application, Agriculture Studies, Law, Nursing & Paramedical, and others. The fee strcuture includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, laboratory fees, security deposit, alumni fees, etc.

faqs.question: How many students can do MBA at Geeta University?
faqs.answer: Geeta University can take many students for MBA. They have enough seats for about 200 students every year. The university has good facilities and experienced teachers to handle this number of students. Students come from different places to study here. They get good education and chances for jobs. If someone wants to know more about the seats and admissions, they can check the university website or talk to the admissions office.

faqs.question: What are the key academic programmes offered by Geeta University?
faqs.answer: Geeta University offers several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, and doctoral levels. The university provides courses in various fields, such as Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, Commerce, Arts, etc. Students seeking to get into the university need to ensure that they fulfil the criteria of the desired programme before applying. Some of the key academic programmes offered at Geeta University are as follows:BTechMTechBBAMBABComMALLBLLMBSc

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Geeta University admission?
faqs.answer: Geeta University eligibility criteriavary depending on the programme selected by the students. Those seeking to get into the university need to ensure that they satisfy the admission criteria before applying. For UG admissions, Class 12 with relevant subjects and in relevant stream is required. Similarly, to get into the postgraduate programmes, students need to complete graduation in the relevant field. As for PhD admission, students need to complete Master's with a minimum aggregate of 50%. For a detailed eligibility criteria, students may visit the official website of the university.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Geeta University?
faqs.answer: To secure admission to any desired course at Geeta University, candidates need to meet the respective eligibility set by the University. To be eligible for admission to UG courses candidates must have Class 10 and Class 12 scorecards and for PG courses candidates must have a graduation degree. The mode of application at Geeta University is online. Geeta University primarily offers merit-based admission to all the courses. However, the university may accept entrance exam scores if required.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Geeta University?
faqs.answer: To secure admission to any desired course at Geeta University, candidates need to meet the respective eligibility set by the University. To be eligible for admission to UG courses candidates must have Class 10 and Class 12 scorecards and for PG courses candidates must have a graduation degree. The mode of application at Geeta University is online. Geeta University offers merit-based admission to all the courses.

reviews.review_text: The campus is good, airy, and it is also clean and green, located in a good place with nice surroundings. All labs and the library are well-equipped. Classrooms have smart boards. Food is good here at the mess. Food cafes are also good here. The hostel is fine here.

reviews.review_heading: Fine college and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is fine sometimes it works, sometimes it does not. The labs are also fine. Classrooms have AC in them, and they are spacious. The library is filled with books but its small. Hostel is fine as I heard from the hostellers as I am a day scholar. The food in mess and canteen is fine.

reviews.review_heading: Good experience at Geeta University!
reviews.review_text: As a BCA AIML student, I can say that the course & curriculum are good here & it is running with advanced technologies. They have Geeta Technical Hub, which not only provides hands-on experience but also makes us industry-ready as they are associated with companies like AWS, CISCO, REDHAT, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am enjoying the vibrant atmosphere at Geeta University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and amenities provided at the campus were much better than what I observed in other institutes. Rather than just providing the best services, they maintained hygiene on the campus, in the mess, and in the classrooms as well. Here, I found the campus catered to services.

reviews.review_heading: Average, not too bad, and not too good. There are lots of fines for very small things.
reviews.review_text: As I am from the nutrition dietetics department, we have well-managed labs and a kitchen. They provide us with all the ingredients we need for cooking during Energy Week. Regarding the hostel, the food quality is overall good, and we have a unique option for ticket raising if we encounter any issues. We can create a ticket, and that goes to our HoD and VC of the college. They also provide us with the solution. They conduct an open house in which our own head of college interacts with students an...

reviews.review_heading: My overall campus life experience at Geeta University has been positive and enriching.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility at Geeta University is comfortable and well managed, making it convenient for students coming from different states. All the classrooms are fully air conditioned with smart boards. Infrastructure is high class. The mess food is decent and hygienic, offering a balanced menu with North Indian meals, occasional special dishes and options for vegetarian students.

reviews.review_heading: Appreciate the campus and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Geeta University is very good with a clean and green campus. Classrooms are modern, very spacious, and well equipped with smart boards and projectors. Wi-Fi connectivity is available throughout the campus. The library is excellent, quiet, peaceful, and well maintained with digital resources, ie e books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: My best time is learning and exploring.
reviews.review_text: The amenities provided by the management were truly commendable. A lot of diligence had been done in maintaining every classroom, lab, and especially the library, which was my favourite. I like to visit day in and day out here. The newspapers-reading area was well-maintained and very calm to sit. The hostel food was my favourite. What I like the most is snack time.

reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with the curriculum and college life. I learnt a lot during my internships.
reviews.review_text: Geeta University is automated, from attendance to grades to raising problems all things can be done online. Wi-Fi is available on the entire campus with your personal university id. Rooms and campus are neat & clean. Mess Food is really good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent core academics with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: I am from the B.Tech CSE course. The most pressing issue is the consistent and low-bandwidth hostel Wi-Fi, which sometimes severely impacts necessary searches. Facilities are clean, and the routine maintenance response time is fast. Common areas are good for socializing, and there are quiet zones or a study room within the hostel. The class can accommodate almost 35-40 students.

reviews.review_heading: Geeta University: A good mix of learning and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: I would rate the course as fairly good. The mentorship is provided by Coding Clock mentors, and they teach really well. The labs are glass labs with 50–60 seats of capacity per lab, and there is fast Wi-Fi in every lab and classroom. However, there is no seminar hall in our CSE department.

reviews.review_heading: This college is allrounder. It provides you everything good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available. Labs were good. Library was excellent, where you could study peacefully. Gym was also available where you could work on your personality. Hostel facility was awesome. I will never complain about this. It was a good budget friendly college that provided you good skills with placement.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, labs are good, classrooms are good, and the library is good. I was a day scholar, but I heard the hostel was good. The food at the mess is fine, not like home, but fine. There are 3 canteens, medical facilities are available, and all types of sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, good hostel.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is fine, labs are fine. Classrooms are fine, the library is good, the hostel is good, and the food is also fine, not like home, but still good. The canteen is fine. There are 3 canteens. Medical facilities are also available, and sports events also happen. Students from other colleges also come.

college_info.college_name: Geeta University

data.description: Geeta university has a good state of art infrastructure with various facilities. Some of these facilities include Hostels, Conference hall, a Library, Labs, Sports, Modern Classrooms, Industry Sponsored Labs, Cafeteria & Tuck Shops, Transport Fleet, Banking Facility, 24hrs CCTV Surveillance, Medical Care Center, etc.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Geeta University

likes.text: This time many companies visited at our campus like Justdail, Maxlife Insurance, Genpect, Bajaj Capital, Centarl Park, Tech Mahindra, Dns Group, Icici Prudential etc.
The overall environment is excellent in this college, But in terms of study or discipline, I would recommend this college for students' future.

college_info.college_name: Geeta University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Geeta University has affordable fee structure. The fee ranges between INR 1.04 lakh- INR 8.75 lakh. The university offers UG, PG, and Diploma courses across Engineering, Management, Commerce, Pharmacy, Computer Application, Agriculture Studies, Law, Nursing & Paramedical, and others. The fee strcuture includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, laboratory fees, security deposit, alumni fees, etc.

The course fee for BSc at Geeta Univerisity is INR 1.1 lakh yearly. The semester-wise tuition fee is INR 55,000. This fee is taken from official sources and hence, is indicative. Candidates are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the same.

Geeta University application fee is INR 1,000. Candidates can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. To fully submit the application form it is mandatory to pay the online fee. Without an application fee, the form is not submitted by the university.

Yes, Geeta University does conduct a scholarship test for its students. The university conducts Geeta University Test of Scholarship (GUTS) based on which students are provided scholarships. Find below the scholarship awarded via GUTS score:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Saveetha College of Liberal Arts and Science, Thandalam Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 60 to 80% of students get placed in campus interview every year. The package offered is around INR 3LPA to 6LPA. All students do internship at some company for 3 months during the course. Top roles offered are assistance account manager etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a world class infrastructure with full Wi-Fi support, play ground, etc. and library has books as well as computers, students can access it with their IDs. The quality of food is good in canteens named Meet and eat & Yamohidin Biryani etc. College has a hospital in the campus itself.

reviews.review_text: The college has a world class infrastructure with full Wi-Fi support, play ground, etc. and library has books as well as computers, students can access it with their IDs. The quality of food is good in canteens named Meet and eat & Yamohidin Biryani etc. College has a hospital in the campus itself.

reviews.review_heading: Well facility and developed professional classrooms and campus
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with well facility library, labs, classrooms interiors, new unique campus, wide range campus and variety of canteen food courts branded cafes , peace area to study, good hostel safe and secure with heavy security even delivery boys are not allowed in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best arts college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: Infrastru of the college is in such a way that no other college in the surrounding can be compared with. No arts and science college can provide such an infrastructure to the students. The college focuses on the development if the students and ensures the satisfaction of the students in all cases.
